contrib/postgres_fdw/expected/postgres_fdw.out
1-- ===================================================================
2-- create FDW objects
3-- ===================================================================
4CREATE EXTENSION postgres_fdw;
5CREATE SERVER testserver1 FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw;
6DO $d$
7    BEGIN
8        EXECUTE $$CREATE SERVER loopback FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw
9            OPTIONS (dbname '$$||current_database()||$$',
10                     port '$$||current_setting('port')||$$'
11            )$$;
12        EXECUTE $$CREATE SERVER loopback2 FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw
13            OPTIONS (dbname '$$||current_database()||$$',
14                     port '$$||current_setting('port')||$$'
15            )$$;
16        EXECUTE $$CREATE SERVER loopback3 FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw
17            OPTIONS (dbname '$$||current_database()||$$',
18                     port '$$||current_setting('port')||$$'
19            )$$;
20    END;
21$d$;
22CREATE USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER testserver1
23	OPTIONS (user 'value', password 'value');
24CREATE USER MAPPING FOR CURRENT_USER SERVER loopback;
25CREATE USER MAPPING FOR CURRENT_USER SERVER loopback2;
26CREATE USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER loopback3;
27-- ===================================================================
28-- create objects used through FDW loopback server
29-- ===================================================================
30CREATE TYPE user_enum AS ENUM ('foo', 'bar', 'buz');
31CREATE SCHEMA "S 1";
32CREATE TABLE "S 1"."T 1" (
33	"C 1" int NOT NULL,
34	c2 int NOT NULL,
35	c3 text,
36	c4 timestamptz,
37	c5 timestamp,
38	c6 varchar(10),
39	c7 char(10),
40	c8 user_enum,
41	CONSTRAINT t1_pkey PRIMARY KEY ("C 1")
42);
43CREATE TABLE "S 1"."T 2" (
44	c1 int NOT NULL,
45	c2 text,
46	CONSTRAINT t2_pkey PRIMARY KEY (c1)
47);
48CREATE TABLE "S 1"."T 3" (
49	c1 int NOT NULL,
50	c2 int NOT NULL,
51	c3 text,
52	CONSTRAINT t3_pkey PRIMARY KEY (c1)
53);
54CREATE TABLE "S 1"."T 4" (
55	c1 int NOT NULL,
56	c2 int NOT NULL,
57	c3 text,
58	CONSTRAINT t4_pkey PRIMARY KEY (c1)
59);
60-- Disable autovacuum for these tables to avoid unexpected effects of that
61ALTER TABLE "S 1"."T 1" SET (autovacuum_enabled = 'false');
62ALTER TABLE "S 1"."T 2" SET (autovacuum_enabled = 'false');
63ALTER TABLE "S 1"."T 3" SET (autovacuum_enabled = 'false');
64ALTER TABLE "S 1"."T 4" SET (autovacuum_enabled = 'false');
65INSERT INTO "S 1"."T 1"
66	SELECT id,
67	       id % 10,
68	       to_char(id, 'FM00000'),
69	       '1970-01-01'::timestamptz + ((id % 100) || ' days')::interval,
70	       '1970-01-01'::timestamp + ((id % 100) || ' days')::interval,
71	       id % 10,
72	       id % 10,
73	       'foo'::user_enum
74	FROM generate_series(1, 1000) id;
75INSERT INTO "S 1"."T 2"
76	SELECT id,
77	       'AAA' || to_char(id, 'FM000')
78	FROM generate_series(1, 100) id;
79INSERT INTO "S 1"."T 3"
80	SELECT id,
81	       id + 1,
82	       'AAA' || to_char(id, 'FM000')
83	FROM generate_series(1, 100) id;
84DELETE FROM "S 1"."T 3" WHERE c1 % 2 != 0;	-- delete for outer join tests
85INSERT INTO "S 1"."T 4"
86	SELECT id,
87	       id + 1,
88	       'AAA' || to_char(id, 'FM000')
89	FROM generate_series(1, 100) id;
90DELETE FROM "S 1"."T 4" WHERE c1 % 3 != 0;	-- delete for outer join tests
91ANALYZE "S 1"."T 1";
92ANALYZE "S 1"."T 2";
93ANALYZE "S 1"."T 3";
94ANALYZE "S 1"."T 4";
95-- ===================================================================
96-- create foreign tables
97-- ===================================================================
98CREATE FOREIGN TABLE ft1 (
99	c0 int,
100	c1 int NOT NULL,
101	c2 int NOT NULL,
102	c3 text,
103	c4 timestamptz,
104	c5 timestamp,
105	c6 varchar(10),
106	c7 char(10) default 'ft1',
107	c8 user_enum
108) SERVER loopback;
109ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft1 DROP COLUMN c0;
110CREATE FOREIGN TABLE ft2 (
111	c1 int NOT NULL,
112	c2 int NOT NULL,
113	cx int,
114	c3 text,
115	c4 timestamptz,
116	c5 timestamp,
117	c6 varchar(10),
118	c7 char(10) default 'ft2',
119	c8 user_enum
120) SERVER loopback;
121ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft2 DROP COLUMN cx;
122CREATE FOREIGN TABLE ft4 (
123	c1 int NOT NULL,
124	c2 int NOT NULL,
125	c3 text
126) SERVER loopback OPTIONS (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 3');
127CREATE FOREIGN TABLE ft5 (
128	c1 int NOT NULL,
129	c2 int NOT NULL,
130	c3 text
131) SERVER loopback OPTIONS (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 4');
132CREATE FOREIGN TABLE ft6 (
133	c1 int NOT NULL,
134	c2 int NOT NULL,
135	c3 text
136) SERVER loopback2 OPTIONS (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 4');
137CREATE FOREIGN TABLE ft7 (
138	c1 int NOT NULL,
139	c2 int NOT NULL,
140	c3 text
141) SERVER loopback3 OPTIONS (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 4');
142-- ===================================================================
143-- tests for validator
144-- ===================================================================
145-- requiressl and some other parameters are omitted because
146-- valid values for them depend on configure options
147ALTER SERVER testserver1 OPTIONS (
148	use_remote_estimate 'false',
149	updatable 'true',
150	fdw_startup_cost '123.456',
151	fdw_tuple_cost '0.123',
152	service 'value',
153	connect_timeout 'value',
154	dbname 'value',
155	host 'value',
156	hostaddr 'value',
157	port 'value',
158	--client_encoding 'value',
159	application_name 'value',
160	--fallback_application_name 'value',
161	keepalives 'value',
162	keepalives_idle 'value',
163	keepalives_interval 'value',
164	tcp_user_timeout 'value',
165	-- requiressl 'value',
166	sslcompression 'value',
167	sslmode 'value',
168	sslcert 'value',
169	sslkey 'value',
170	sslrootcert 'value',
171	sslcrl 'value',
172	--requirepeer 'value',
173	krbsrvname 'value',
174	gsslib 'value',
175	gssdelegation 'value'
176	--replication 'value'
177);
178-- Error, invalid list syntax
179ALTER SERVER testserver1 OPTIONS (ADD extensions 'foo; bar');
180ERROR:  parameter "extensions" must be a list of extension names
181-- OK but gets a warning
182ALTER SERVER testserver1 OPTIONS (ADD extensions 'foo, bar');
183WARNING:  extension "foo" is not installed
184WARNING:  extension "bar" is not installed
185ALTER SERVER testserver1 OPTIONS (DROP extensions);
186ALTER USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER testserver1
187	OPTIONS (DROP user, DROP password);
188-- Attempt to add a valid option that's not allowed in a user mapping
189ALTER USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER testserver1
190	OPTIONS (ADD sslmode 'require');
191ERROR:  invalid option "sslmode"
192-- But we can add valid ones fine
193ALTER USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER testserver1
194	OPTIONS (ADD sslpassword 'dummy');
195-- Ensure valid options we haven't used in a user mapping yet are
196-- permitted to check validation.
197ALTER USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER testserver1
198	OPTIONS (ADD sslkey 'value', ADD sslcert 'value');
199-- OAuth options are not allowed in either context
200ALTER SERVER testserver1 OPTIONS (ADD oauth_issuer 'https://example.com');
201ERROR:  invalid option "oauth_issuer"
202ALTER SERVER testserver1 OPTIONS (ADD oauth_client_id 'myID');
203ERROR:  invalid option "oauth_client_id"
204ALTER USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER testserver1
205	OPTIONS (ADD oauth_issuer 'https://example.com');
206ERROR:  invalid option "oauth_issuer"
207ALTER USER MAPPING FOR public SERVER testserver1
208	OPTIONS (ADD oauth_client_id 'myID');
209ERROR:  invalid option "oauth_client_id"
210ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft1 OPTIONS (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 1');
211ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft2 OPTIONS (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 1');
212ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft1 ALTER COLUMN c1 OPTIONS (column_name 'C 1');
213ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft2 ALTER COLUMN c1 OPTIONS (column_name 'C 1');
214\det+
215                              List of foreign tables
216 Schema | Table |  Server   |              FDW options              | Description 
217--------+-------+-----------+---------------------------------------+-------------
218 public | ft1   | loopback  | (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 1') | 
219 public | ft2   | loopback  | (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 1') | 
220 public | ft4   | loopback  | (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 3') | 
221 public | ft5   | loopback  | (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 4') | 
222 public | ft6   | loopback2 | (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 4') | 
223 public | ft7   | loopback3 | (schema_name 'S 1', table_name 'T 4') | 
224(6 rows)
225
226-- Test that alteration of server options causes reconnection
227-- Remote's errors might be non-English, so hide them to ensure stable results
228\set VERBOSITY terse
229SELECT c3, c4 FROM ft1 ORDER BY c3, c1 LIMIT 1;  -- should work
230  c3   |              c4              
231-------+------------------------------
232 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST
233(1 row)
234
235ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (SET dbname 'no such database');
236SELECT c3, c4 FROM ft1 ORDER BY c3, c1 LIMIT 1;  -- should fail
237ERROR:  could not connect to server "loopback"
238DO $d$
239    BEGIN
240        EXECUTE $$ALTER SERVER loopback
241            OPTIONS (SET dbname '$$||current_database()||$$')$$;
242    END;
243$d$;
244SELECT c3, c4 FROM ft1 ORDER BY c3, c1 LIMIT 1;  -- should work again
245  c3   |              c4              
246-------+------------------------------
247 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST
248(1 row)
249
250-- Test that alteration of user mapping options causes reconnection
251ALTER USER MAPPING FOR CURRENT_USER SERVER loopback
252  OPTIONS (ADD user 'no such user');
253SELECT c3, c4 FROM ft1 ORDER BY c3, c1 LIMIT 1;  -- should fail
254ERROR:  could not connect to server "loopback"
255ALTER USER MAPPING FOR CURRENT_USER SERVER loopback
256  OPTIONS (DROP user);
257SELECT c3, c4 FROM ft1 ORDER BY c3, c1 LIMIT 1;  -- should work again
258  c3   |              c4              
259-------+------------------------------
260 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST
261(1 row)
262
263\set VERBOSITY default
264-- Now we should be able to run ANALYZE.
265-- To exercise multiple code paths, we use local stats on ft1
266-- and remote-estimate mode on ft2.
267ANALYZE ft1;
268ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft2 OPTIONS (use_remote_estimate 'true');
269-- ===================================================================
270-- test error case for create publication on foreign table
271-- ===================================================================
272CREATE PUBLICATION testpub_ftbl FOR TABLE ft1;  -- should fail
273ERROR:  cannot add relation "ft1" to publication
274DETAIL:  This operation is not supported for foreign tables.
275-- ===================================================================
276-- simple queries
277-- ===================================================================
278-- single table without alias
279EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 ORDER BY c3, c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
280     QUERY PLAN      
281---------------------
282 Foreign Scan on ft1
283(1 row)
284
285SELECT * FROM ft1 ORDER BY c3, c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
286 c1  | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
287-----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
288 101 |  1 | 00101 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
289 102 |  2 | 00102 | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 | 2  | 2          | foo
290 103 |  3 | 00103 | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 | 3  | 3          | foo
291 104 |  4 | 00104 | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 PST | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 | 4  | 4          | foo
292 105 |  5 | 00105 | Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 PST | Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 | 5  | 5          | foo
293 106 |  6 | 00106 | Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 PST | Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 | 6  | 6          | foo
294 107 |  7 | 00107 | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 PST | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 | 7  | 7          | foo
295 108 |  8 | 00108 | Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 | 8  | 8          | foo
296 109 |  9 | 00109 | Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 | 9  | 9          | foo
297 110 |  0 | 00110 | Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 | 0  | 0          | foo
298(10 rows)
299
300-- single table with alias - also test that tableoid sort is not pushed to remote side
301EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1, t1.tableoid OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
302                                     QUERY PLAN                                      
303-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
304 Limit
305   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, tableoid
306   ->  Sort
307         Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, tableoid
308         Sort Key: t1.c3, t1.c1, t1.tableoid
309         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
310               Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, tableoid
311               Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
312(8 rows)
313
314SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1, t1.tableoid OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
315 c1  | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
316-----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
317 101 |  1 | 00101 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
318 102 |  2 | 00102 | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 | 2  | 2          | foo
319 103 |  3 | 00103 | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 | 3  | 3          | foo
320 104 |  4 | 00104 | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 PST | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 | 4  | 4          | foo
321 105 |  5 | 00105 | Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 PST | Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 | 5  | 5          | foo
322 106 |  6 | 00106 | Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 PST | Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 | 6  | 6          | foo
323 107 |  7 | 00107 | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 PST | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 | 7  | 7          | foo
324 108 |  8 | 00108 | Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 | 8  | 8          | foo
325 109 |  9 | 00109 | Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 | 9  | 9          | foo
326 110 |  0 | 00110 | Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 | 0  | 0          | foo
327(10 rows)
328
329-- whole-row reference
330EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT t1 FROM ft1 t1 ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
331                                                                          QUERY PLAN                                                                          
332--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
333 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
334   Output: t1.*, c3, c1
335   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" ORDER BY c3 ASC NULLS LAST, "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10::bigint OFFSET 100::bigint
336(3 rows)
337
338SELECT t1 FROM ft1 t1 ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
339                                             t1                                             
340--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
341 (101,1,00101,"Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST","Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970",1,"1         ",foo)
342 (102,2,00102,"Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST","Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970",2,"2         ",foo)
343 (103,3,00103,"Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 PST","Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970",3,"3         ",foo)
344 (104,4,00104,"Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 PST","Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970",4,"4         ",foo)
345 (105,5,00105,"Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 PST","Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970",5,"5         ",foo)
346 (106,6,00106,"Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 PST","Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970",6,"6         ",foo)
347 (107,7,00107,"Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 PST","Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970",7,"7         ",foo)
348 (108,8,00108,"Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 PST","Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970",8,"8         ",foo)
349 (109,9,00109,"Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 PST","Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970",9,"9         ",foo)
350 (110,0,00110,"Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 PST","Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970",0,"0         ",foo)
351(10 rows)
352
353-- empty result
354SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE false;
355 c1 | c2 | c3 | c4 | c5 | c6 | c7 | c8 
356----+----+----+----+----+----+----+----
357(0 rows)
358
359-- with WHERE clause
360EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = 101 AND t1.c6 = '1' AND t1.c7 >= '1';
361                                                            QUERY PLAN                                                            
362----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
363 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
364   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
365   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c7 >= '1')) AND (("C 1" = 101)) AND ((c6 = '1'))
366(3 rows)
367
368SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = 101 AND t1.c6 = '1' AND t1.c7 >= '1';
369 c1  | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
370-----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
371 101 |  1 | 00101 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
372(1 row)
373
374-- with FOR UPDATE/SHARE
375EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = 101 FOR UPDATE;
376                                                QUERY PLAN                                                
377----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
378 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
379   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, t1.*
380   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 101)) FOR UPDATE
381(3 rows)
382
383SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = 101 FOR UPDATE;
384 c1  | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
385-----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
386 101 |  1 | 00101 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
387(1 row)
388
389EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = 102 FOR SHARE;
390                                               QUERY PLAN                                                
391---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
392 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
393   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, t1.*
394   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 102)) FOR SHARE
395(3 rows)
396
397SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = 102 FOR SHARE;
398 c1  | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
399-----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
400 102 |  2 | 00102 | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 | 2  | 2          | foo
401(1 row)
402
403-- aggregate
404SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ft1 t1;
405 count 
406-------
407  1000
408(1 row)
409
410-- subquery
411SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c3 IN (SELECT c3 FROM ft2 t2 WHERE c1 <= 10) ORDER BY c1;
412 c1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
413----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
414  1 |  1 | 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
415  2 |  2 | 00002 | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 | 2  | 2          | foo
416  3 |  3 | 00003 | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 | 3  | 3          | foo
417  4 |  4 | 00004 | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 PST | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 | 4  | 4          | foo
418  5 |  5 | 00005 | Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 PST | Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 | 5  | 5          | foo
419  6 |  6 | 00006 | Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 PST | Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 | 6  | 6          | foo
420  7 |  7 | 00007 | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 PST | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 | 7  | 7          | foo
421  8 |  8 | 00008 | Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 | 8  | 8          | foo
422  9 |  9 | 00009 | Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 | 9  | 9          | foo
423 10 |  0 | 00010 | Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 | 0  | 0          | foo
424(10 rows)
425
426-- subquery+MAX
427SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c3 = (SELECT MAX(c3) FROM ft2 t2) ORDER BY c1;
428  c1  | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
429------+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
430 1000 |  0 | 01000 | Thu Jan 01 00:00:00 1970 PST | Thu Jan 01 00:00:00 1970 | 0  | 0          | foo
431(1 row)
432
433-- used in CTE
434WITH t1 AS (SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE c1 <= 10) SELECT t2.c1, t2.c2, t2.c3, t2.c4 FROM t1, ft2 t2 WHERE t1.c1 = t2.c1 ORDER BY t1.c1;
435 c1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              
436----+----+-------+------------------------------
437  1 |  1 | 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST
438  2 |  2 | 00002 | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST
439  3 |  3 | 00003 | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 PST
440  4 |  4 | 00004 | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 PST
441  5 |  5 | 00005 | Tue Jan 06 00:00:00 1970 PST
442  6 |  6 | 00006 | Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970 PST
443  7 |  7 | 00007 | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 PST
444  8 |  8 | 00008 | Fri Jan 09 00:00:00 1970 PST
445  9 |  9 | 00009 | Sat Jan 10 00:00:00 1970 PST
446 10 |  0 | 00010 | Sun Jan 11 00:00:00 1970 PST
447(10 rows)
448
449-- fixed values
450SELECT 'fixed', NULL FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = 1;
451 ?column? | ?column? 
452----------+----------
453 fixed    | 
454(1 row)
455
456-- Test forcing the remote server to produce sorted data for a merge join.
457SET enable_hashjoin TO false;
458SET enable_nestloop TO false;
459-- inner join; expressions in the clauses appear in the equivalence class list
460EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
461	SELECT t1.c1, t2."C 1" FROM ft2 t1 JOIN "S 1"."T 1" t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
462                                      QUERY PLAN                                       
463---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
464 Limit
465   Output: t1.c1, t2."C 1"
466   ->  Merge Join
467         Output: t1.c1, t2."C 1"
468         Inner Unique: true
469         Merge Cond: (t1.c1 = t2."C 1")
470         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2 t1
471               Output: t1.c1
472               Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
473         ->  Index Only Scan using t1_pkey on "S 1"."T 1" t2
474               Output: t2."C 1"
475(11 rows)
476
477SELECT t1.c1, t2."C 1" FROM ft2 t1 JOIN "S 1"."T 1" t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
478 c1  | C 1 
479-----+-----
480 101 | 101
481 102 | 102
482 103 | 103
483 104 | 104
484 105 | 105
485 106 | 106
486 107 | 107
487 108 | 108
488 109 | 109
489 110 | 110
490(10 rows)
491
492-- outer join; expressions in the clauses do not appear in equivalence class
493-- list but no output change as compared to the previous query
494EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
495	SELECT t1.c1, t2."C 1" FROM ft2 t1 LEFT JOIN "S 1"."T 1" t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
496                                      QUERY PLAN                                       
497---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
498 Limit
499   Output: t1.c1, t2."C 1"
500   ->  Merge Left Join
501         Output: t1.c1, t2."C 1"
502         Inner Unique: true
503         Merge Cond: (t1.c1 = t2."C 1")
504         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2 t1
505               Output: t1.c1
506               Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
507         ->  Index Only Scan using t1_pkey on "S 1"."T 1" t2
508               Output: t2."C 1"
509(11 rows)
510
511SELECT t1.c1, t2."C 1" FROM ft2 t1 LEFT JOIN "S 1"."T 1" t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
512 c1  | C 1 
513-----+-----
514 101 | 101
515 102 | 102
516 103 | 103
517 104 | 104
518 105 | 105
519 106 | 106
520 107 | 107
521 108 | 108
522 109 | 109
523 110 | 110
524(10 rows)
525
526-- A join between local table and foreign join. ORDER BY clause is added to the
527-- foreign join so that the local table can be joined using merge join strategy.
528EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
529	SELECT t1."C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1 left join ft1 t2 join ft2 t3 on (t2.c1 = t3.c1) on (t3.c1 = t1."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
530                                                                       QUERY PLAN                                                                        
531---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
532 Limit
533   Output: t1."C 1"
534   ->  Merge Right Join
535         Output: t1."C 1"
536         Inner Unique: true
537         Merge Cond: (t3.c1 = t1."C 1")
538         ->  Foreign Scan
539               Output: t3.c1
540               Relations: (public.ft1 t2) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t3)
541               Remote SQL: SELECT r3."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r2 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r3 ON (((r3."C 1" = r2."C 1")))) ORDER BY r2."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
542         ->  Index Only Scan using t1_pkey on "S 1"."T 1" t1
543               Output: t1."C 1"
544(12 rows)
545
546SELECT t1."C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1 left join ft1 t2 join ft2 t3 on (t2.c1 = t3.c1) on (t3.c1 = t1."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
547 C 1 
548-----
549 101
550 102
551 103
552 104
553 105
554 106
555 107
556 108
557 109
558 110
559(10 rows)
560
561-- Test similar to above, except that the full join prevents any equivalence
562-- classes from being merged. This produces single relation equivalence classes
563-- included in join restrictions.
564EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
565	SELECT t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1 left join ft1 t2 full join ft2 t3 on (t2.c1 = t3.c1) on (t3.c1 = t1."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
566                                                                            QUERY PLAN                                                                            
567------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
568 Limit
569   Output: t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1
570   ->  Merge Right Join
571         Output: t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1
572         Inner Unique: true
573         Merge Cond: (t3.c1 = t1."C 1")
574         ->  Foreign Scan
575               Output: t3.c1, t2.c1
576               Relations: (public.ft2 t3) LEFT JOIN (public.ft1 t2)
577               Remote SQL: SELECT r3."C 1", r2."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r3 LEFT JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r3."C 1")))) ORDER BY r3."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
578         ->  Index Only Scan using t1_pkey on "S 1"."T 1" t1
579               Output: t1."C 1"
580(12 rows)
581
582SELECT t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1 left join ft1 t2 full join ft2 t3 on (t2.c1 = t3.c1) on (t3.c1 = t1."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
583 C 1 | c1  | c1  
584-----+-----+-----
585 101 | 101 | 101
586 102 | 102 | 102
587 103 | 103 | 103
588 104 | 104 | 104
589 105 | 105 | 105
590 106 | 106 | 106
591 107 | 107 | 107
592 108 | 108 | 108
593 109 | 109 | 109
594 110 | 110 | 110
595(10 rows)
596
597-- Test similar to above with all full outer joins
598EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
599	SELECT t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1 full join ft1 t2 full join ft2 t3 on (t2.c1 = t3.c1) on (t3.c1 = t1."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
600                                                                            QUERY PLAN                                                                            
601------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
602 Limit
603   Output: t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1
604   ->  Merge Full Join
605         Output: t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1
606         Inner Unique: true
607         Merge Cond: (t3.c1 = t1."C 1")
608         ->  Foreign Scan
609               Output: t2.c1, t3.c1
610               Relations: (public.ft1 t2) FULL JOIN (public.ft2 t3)
611               Remote SQL: SELECT r2."C 1", r3."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r2 FULL JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r3 ON (((r2."C 1" = r3."C 1")))) ORDER BY r3."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
612         ->  Index Only Scan using t1_pkey on "S 1"."T 1" t1
613               Output: t1."C 1"
614(12 rows)
615
616SELECT t1."C 1", t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1 full join ft1 t2 full join ft2 t3 on (t2.c1 = t3.c1) on (t3.c1 = t1."C 1") OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
617 C 1 | c1  | c1  
618-----+-----+-----
619 101 | 101 | 101
620 102 | 102 | 102
621 103 | 103 | 103
622 104 | 104 | 104
623 105 | 105 | 105
624 106 | 106 | 106
625 107 | 107 | 107
626 108 | 108 | 108
627 109 | 109 | 109
628 110 | 110 | 110
629(10 rows)
630
631RESET enable_hashjoin;
632RESET enable_nestloop;
633-- Test executing assertion in estimate_path_cost_size() that makes sure that
634-- retrieved_rows for foreign rel re-used to cost pre-sorted foreign paths is
635-- a sensible value even when the rel has tuples=0
636CREATE TABLE loct_empty (c1 int NOT NULL, c2 text);
637CREATE FOREIGN TABLE ft_empty (c1 int NOT NULL, c2 text)
638  SERVER loopback OPTIONS (table_name 'loct_empty');
639INSERT INTO loct_empty
640  SELECT id, 'AAA' || to_char(id, 'FM000') FROM generate_series(1, 100) id;
641DELETE FROM loct_empty;
642ANALYZE ft_empty;
643EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft_empty ORDER BY c1;
644                                  QUERY PLAN                                   
645-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
646 Foreign Scan on public.ft_empty
647   Output: c1, c2
648   Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2 FROM public.loct_empty ORDER BY c1 ASC NULLS LAST
649(3 rows)
650
651-- test restriction on non-system foreign tables.
652SET restrict_nonsystem_relation_kind TO 'foreign-table';
653SELECT * from ft1 where c1 < 1; -- ERROR
654ERROR:  access to non-system foreign table is restricted
655INSERT INTO ft1 (c1) VALUES (1); -- ERROR
656ERROR:  access to non-system foreign table is restricted
657DELETE FROM ft1 WHERE c1 = 1; -- ERROR
658ERROR:  access to non-system foreign table is restricted
659TRUNCATE ft1; -- ERROR
660ERROR:  access to non-system foreign table is restricted
661RESET restrict_nonsystem_relation_kind;
662-- ===================================================================
663-- WHERE with remotely-executable conditions
664-- ===================================================================
665EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = 1;         -- Var, OpExpr(b), Const
666                                         QUERY PLAN                                          
667---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
668 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
669   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
670   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 1))
671(3 rows)
672
673EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = 100 AND t1.c2 = 0; -- BoolExpr
674                                                  QUERY PLAN                                                  
675--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
676 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
677   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
678   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 100)) AND ((c2 = 0))
679(3 rows)
680
681EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c3 IS NULL;        -- NullTest
682                                          QUERY PLAN                                          
683----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
684 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
685   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
686   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c3 IS NULL))
687(3 rows)
688
689EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;    -- NullTest
690                                            QUERY PLAN                                            
691--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
692 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
693   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
694   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c3 IS NOT NULL))
695(3 rows)
696
697EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE round(abs(c1), 0) = 1; -- FuncExpr
698                                                     QUERY PLAN                                                      
699---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
700 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
701   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
702   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((round(abs("C 1"), 0) = 1::numeric))
703(3 rows)
704
705EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = -c1;          -- OpExpr(l)
706                                             QUERY PLAN                                              
707-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
708 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
709   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
710   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = (- "C 1")))
711(3 rows)
712
713EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE (c1 IS NOT NULL) IS DISTINCT FROM (c1 IS NOT NULL); -- DistinctExpr
714                                                                 QUERY PLAN                                                                 
715--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
716 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
717   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
718   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((("C 1" IS NOT NULL) IS DISTINCT FROM ("C 1" IS NOT NULL)))
719(3 rows)
720
721EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = ANY(ARRAY[c2, 1, c1 + 0]); -- ScalarArrayOpExpr
722                                                        QUERY PLAN                                                         
723---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
724 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
725   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
726   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = ANY (ARRAY[c2, 1, ("C 1" + 0)])))
727(3 rows)
728
729EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c1 = (ARRAY[c1,c2,3])[1]; -- SubscriptingRef
730                                                      QUERY PLAN                                                      
731----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
732 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
733   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
734   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = ((ARRAY["C 1", c2, 3])[1])))
735(3 rows)
736
737EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c6 = E'foo''s\\bar';  -- check special chars
738                                              QUERY PLAN                                               
739-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
740 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
741   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
742   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c6 = E'foo''s\\bar'))
743(3 rows)
744
745EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE c8 = 'foo';  -- can't be sent to remote
746                               QUERY PLAN                                
747-------------------------------------------------------------------------
748 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
749   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
750   Filter: (t1.c8 = 'foo'::user_enum)
751   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
752(4 rows)
753
754-- parameterized remote path for foreign table
755EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
756  SELECT * FROM "S 1"."T 1" a, ft2 b WHERE a."C 1" = 47 AND b.c1 = a.c2;
757                                                 QUERY PLAN                                                  
758-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
759 Nested Loop
760   Output: a."C 1", a.c2, a.c3, a.c4, a.c5, a.c6, a.c7, a.c8, b.c1, b.c2, b.c3, b.c4, b.c5, b.c6, b.c7, b.c8
761   ->  Index Scan using t1_pkey on "S 1"."T 1" a
762         Output: a."C 1", a.c2, a.c3, a.c4, a.c5, a.c6, a.c7, a.c8
763         Index Cond: (a."C 1" = 47)
764   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2 b
765         Output: b.c1, b.c2, b.c3, b.c4, b.c5, b.c6, b.c7, b.c8
766         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = $1::integer))
767(8 rows)
768
769SELECT * FROM "S 1"."T 1" a, ft2 b WHERE a."C 1" = 47 AND b.c1 = a.c2;
770 C 1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  | c1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
771-----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----+----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
772  47 |  7 | 00047 | Tue Feb 17 00:00:00 1970 PST | Tue Feb 17 00:00:00 1970 | 7  | 7          | foo |  7 |  7 | 00007 | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 PST | Thu Jan 08 00:00:00 1970 | 7  | 7          | foo
773(1 row)
774
775-- check both safe and unsafe join conditions
776EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
777  SELECT * FROM ft2 a, ft2 b
778  WHERE a.c2 = 6 AND b.c1 = a.c1 AND a.c8 = 'foo' AND b.c7 = upper(a.c7);
779                                                 QUERY PLAN                                                  
780-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
781 Nested Loop
782   Output: a.c1, a.c2, a.c3, a.c4, a.c5, a.c6, a.c7, a.c8, b.c1, b.c2, b.c3, b.c4, b.c5, b.c6, b.c7, b.c8
783   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2 a
784         Output: a.c1, a.c2, a.c3, a.c4, a.c5, a.c6, a.c7, a.c8
785         Filter: (a.c8 = 'foo'::user_enum)
786         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c2 = 6))
787   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2 b
788         Output: b.c1, b.c2, b.c3, b.c4, b.c5, b.c6, b.c7, b.c8
789         Filter: ((b.c7)::text = upper((a.c7)::text))
790         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (($1::integer = "C 1"))
791(10 rows)
792
793SELECT * FROM ft2 a, ft2 b
794WHERE a.c2 = 6 AND b.c1 = a.c1 AND a.c8 = 'foo' AND b.c7 = upper(a.c7);

899-- bug before 9.3.5 due to sloppy handling of remote-estimate parameters
900SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE c1 = ANY (ARRAY(SELECT c1 FROM ft2 WHERE c1 < 5));
901 c1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
902----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----

904  2 |  2 | 00002 | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 | 2  | 2          | foo
905  3 |  3 | 00003 | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 | 3  | 3          | foo
906  4 |  4 | 00004 | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 PST | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 | 4  | 4          | foo
907(4 rows)
908
909SELECT * FROM ft2 WHERE c1 = ANY (ARRAY(SELECT c1 FROM ft1 WHERE c1 < 5));
910 c1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
911----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
912  1 |  1 | 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
913  2 |  2 | 00002 | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sat Jan 03 00:00:00 1970 | 2  | 2          | foo
914  3 |  3 | 00003 | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 PST | Sun Jan 04 00:00:00 1970 | 3  | 3          | foo
915  4 |  4 | 00004 | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 PST | Mon Jan 05 00:00:00 1970 | 4  | 4          | foo
916(4 rows)
917
918-- user-defined operator/function
919CREATE FUNCTION postgres_fdw_abs(int) RETURNS int AS $$
920BEGIN
921RETURN abs($1);
922END
923$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql IMMUTABLE;
924CREATE OPERATOR === (
925    LEFTARG = int,
926    RIGHTARG = int,
927    PROCEDURE = int4eq,
928    COMMUTATOR = ===
929);
930-- built-in operators and functions can be shipped for remote execution
931EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
932  SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = abs(t1.c2);
933                                QUERY PLAN                                 
934---------------------------------------------------------------------------
935 Foreign Scan
936   Output: (count(c3))
937   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1 t1)
938   Remote SQL: SELECT count(c3) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = abs(c2)))
939(4 rows)
940
941SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = abs(t1.c2);
942 count 
943-------
944     9
945(1 row)
946
947EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
948  SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = t1.c2;
949                              QUERY PLAN                              
950----------------------------------------------------------------------
951 Foreign Scan
952   Output: (count(c3))
953   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1 t1)
954   Remote SQL: SELECT count(c3) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = c2))
955(4 rows)
956
957SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = t1.c2;
958 count 
959-------
960     9
961(1 row)
962
963-- by default, user-defined ones cannot
964EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
965  SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c2);
966                        QUERY PLAN                         
967-----------------------------------------------------------
968 Aggregate
969   Output: count(c3)
970   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
971         Output: c3
972         Filter: (t1.c1 = postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c2))
973         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
974(6 rows)
975
976SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c2);
977 count 
978-------
979     9
980(1 row)
981
982EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
983  SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2;
984                        QUERY PLAN                         
985-----------------------------------------------------------
986 Aggregate
987   Output: count(c3)
988   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
989         Output: c3
990         Filter: (t1.c1 === t1.c2)
991         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
992(6 rows)
993
994SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2;
995 count 
996-------
997     9
998(1 row)
999
1000-- ORDER BY can be shipped, though
1001EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1002  SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2 order by t1.c2 limit 1;
1003                                                QUERY PLAN                                                
1004----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1005 Limit
1006   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1007   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
1008         Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1009         Filter: (t1.c1 === t1.c2)
1010         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" ORDER BY c2 ASC NULLS LAST
1011(6 rows)
1012
1013SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2 order by t1.c2 limit 1;
1014 c1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
1015----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
1016  1 |  1 | 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
1017(1 row)
1018
1019-- but let's put them in an extension ...
1020ALTER EXTENSION postgres_fdw ADD FUNCTION postgres_fdw_abs(int);
1021ALTER EXTENSION postgres_fdw ADD OPERATOR === (int, int);
1022ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (ADD extensions 'postgres_fdw');
1023-- ... now they can be shipped
1024EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1025  SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c2);
1026                                          QUERY PLAN                                           
1027-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1028 Foreign Scan
1029   Output: (count(c3))
1030   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1 t1)
1031   Remote SQL: SELECT count(c3) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = public.postgres_fdw_abs(c2)))
1032(4 rows)
1033
1034SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 = postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c2);
1035 count 
1036-------
1037     9
1038(1 row)
1039
1040EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1041  SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2;
1042                                       QUERY PLAN                                        
1043-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1044 Foreign Scan
1045   Output: (count(c3))
1046   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1 t1)
1047   Remote SQL: SELECT count(c3) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" OPERATOR(public.===) c2))
1048(4 rows)
1049
1050SELECT count(c3) FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2;
1051 count 
1052-------
1053     9
1054(1 row)
1055
1056-- and both ORDER BY and LIMIT can be shipped
1057EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1058  SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2 order by t1.c2 limit 1;
1059                                                                         QUERY PLAN                                                                         
1060------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1061 Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
1062   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1063   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" OPERATOR(public.===) c2)) ORDER BY c2 ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1::bigint
1064(3 rows)
1065
1066SELECT * FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 === t1.c2 order by t1.c2 limit 1;
1067 c1 | c2 |  c3   |              c4              |            c5            | c6 |     c7     | c8  
1068----+----+-------+------------------------------+--------------------------+----+------------+-----
1069  1 |  1 | 00001 | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 PST | Fri Jan 02 00:00:00 1970 | 1  | 1          | foo
1070(1 row)
1071
1072-- Ensure we don't ship FETCH FIRST .. WITH TIES
1073EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1074SELECT t1.c2 FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 > 960 ORDER BY t1.c2 FETCH FIRST 2 ROWS WITH TIES;
1075                                           QUERY PLAN                                            
1076-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1077 Limit
1078   Output: c2
1079   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
1080         Output: c2
1081         Remote SQL: SELECT c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" > 960)) ORDER BY c2 ASC NULLS LAST
1082(5 rows)
1083
1084SELECT t1.c2 FROM ft1 t1 WHERE t1.c1 > 960 ORDER BY t1.c2 FETCH FIRST 2 ROWS WITH TIES;
1085 c2 
1086----
1087  0
1088  0
1089  0
1090  0
1091(4 rows)
1092
1093-- Test CASE pushdown
1094EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1095SELECT c1,c2,c3 FROM ft2 WHERE CASE WHEN c1 > 990 THEN c1 END < 1000 ORDER BY c1;
1096                                                                           QUERY PLAN                                                                           
1097----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1098 Foreign Scan on public.ft2
1099   Output: c1, c2, c3
1100   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (((CASE WHEN ("C 1" > 990) THEN "C 1" ELSE NULL::integer END) < 1000)) ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
1101(3 rows)
1102
1103SELECT c1,c2,c3 FROM ft2 WHERE CASE WHEN c1 > 990 THEN c1 END < 1000 ORDER BY c1;
1104 c1  | c2 |  c3   
1105-----+----+-------
1106 991 |  1 | 00991
1107 992 |  2 | 00992
1108 993 |  3 | 00993
1109 994 |  4 | 00994
1110 995 |  5 | 00995
1111 996 |  6 | 00996
1112 997 |  7 | 00997
1113 998 |  8 | 00998
1114 999 |  9 | 00999
1115(9 rows)
1116
1117-- Nested CASE
1118EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1119SELECT c1,c2,c3 FROM ft2 WHERE CASE CASE WHEN c2 > 0 THEN c2 END WHEN 100 THEN 601 WHEN c2 THEN c2 ELSE 0 END > 600 ORDER BY c1;
1120                                                                                                QUERY PLAN                                                                                                 
1121-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1122 Foreign Scan on public.ft2
1123   Output: c1, c2, c3
1124   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (((CASE (CASE WHEN (c2 > 0) THEN c2 ELSE NULL::integer END) WHEN 100 THEN 601 WHEN c2 THEN c2 ELSE 0 END) > 600)) ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
1125(3 rows)
1126
1127SELECT c1,c2,c3 FROM ft2 WHERE CASE CASE WHEN c2 > 0 THEN c2 END WHEN 100 THEN 601 WHEN c2 THEN c2 ELSE 0 END > 600 ORDER BY c1;
1128 c1 | c2 | c3 
1129----+----+----
1130(0 rows)
1131
1132-- CASE arg WHEN
1133EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1134SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE c1 > (CASE mod(c1, 4) WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 50 ELSE 100 END);
1135                                                                        QUERY PLAN                                                                        
1136----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1137 Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1138   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1139   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" > (CASE mod("C 1", 4) WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 50 ELSE 100 END)))
1140(3 rows)
1141
1142-- CASE cannot be pushed down because of unshippable arg clause
1143EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1144SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE c1 > (CASE random()::integer WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 50 ELSE 100 END);
1145                                       QUERY PLAN                                        
1146-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1147 Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1148   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1149   Filter: (ft1.c1 > CASE (random())::integer WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 50 ELSE 100 END)
1150   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
1151(4 rows)
1152
1153-- these are shippable
1154EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1155SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE CASE c6 WHEN 'foo' THEN true ELSE c3 < 'bar' END;
1156                                                                 QUERY PLAN                                                                 
1157--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1158 Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1159   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1160   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((CASE c6 WHEN 'foo'::text THEN true ELSE (c3 < 'bar') END))
1161(3 rows)
1162
1163EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1164SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE CASE c3 WHEN c6 THEN true ELSE c3 < 'bar' END;
1165                                                            QUERY PLAN                                                             
1166-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1167 Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1168   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1169   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((CASE c3 WHEN c6 THEN true ELSE (c3 < 'bar') END))
1170(3 rows)
1171
1172-- but this is not because of collation
1173EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1174SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE CASE c3 COLLATE "C" WHEN c6 THEN true ELSE c3 < 'bar' END;
1175                                     QUERY PLAN                                      
1176-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1177 Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1178   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8
1179   Filter: CASE (ft1.c3)::text WHEN ft1.c6 THEN true ELSE (ft1.c3 < 'bar'::text) END
1180   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
1181(4 rows)
1182
1183-- a regconfig constant referring to this text search configuration
1184-- is initially unshippable
1185CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION public.custom_search
1186  (COPY = pg_catalog.english);
1187EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1188SELECT c1, to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3) FROM ft1
1189WHERE c1 = 642 AND length(to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3)) > 0;
1190                               QUERY PLAN                                
1191-------------------------------------------------------------------------
1192 Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1193   Output: c1, to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3)
1194   Filter: (length(to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, ft1.c3)) > 0)
1195   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c3 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 642))
1196(4 rows)
1197
1198SELECT c1, to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3) FROM ft1
1199WHERE c1 = 642 AND length(to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3)) > 0;
1200 c1  | to_tsvector 
1201-----+-------------
1202 642 | '00642':1
1203(1 row)
1204
1205-- but if it's in a shippable extension, it can be shipped
1206ALTER EXTENSION postgres_fdw ADD TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION public.custom_search;
1207-- however, that doesn't flush the shippability cache, so do a quick reconnect
1208\c -
1209EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1210SELECT c1, to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3) FROM ft1
1211WHERE c1 = 642 AND length(to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3)) > 0;
1212                                                                  QUERY PLAN                                                                  
1213----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1214 Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1215   Output: c1, to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3)
1216   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c3 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 642)) AND ((length(to_tsvector('public.custom_search'::regconfig, c3)) > 0))
1217(3 rows)
1218
1219SELECT c1, to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3) FROM ft1
1220WHERE c1 = 642 AND length(to_tsvector('custom_search'::regconfig, c3)) > 0;
1221 c1  | to_tsvector 
1222-----+-------------
1223 642 | '00642':1
1224(1 row)
1225
1226-- ===================================================================
1227-- ORDER BY queries
1228-- ===================================================================
1229-- we should not push order by clause with volatile expressions or unsafe
1230-- collations
1231EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1232	SELECT * FROM ft2 ORDER BY ft2.c1, random();
1233                                  QUERY PLAN                                   
1234-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1235 Sort
1236   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, (random())
1237   Sort Key: ft2.c1, (random())
1238   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
1239         Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, random()
1240         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
1241(6 rows)
1242
1243EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1244	SELECT * FROM ft2 ORDER BY ft2.c1, ft2.c3 collate "C";
1245                                  QUERY PLAN                                   
1246-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1247 Sort
1248   Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, ((c3)::text)
1249   Sort Key: ft2.c1, ft2.c3 COLLATE "C"
1250   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
1251         Output: c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, c3
1252         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
1253(6 rows)
1254
1255-- Ensure we don't push ORDER BY expressions which are Consts at the UNION
1256-- child level to the foreign server.
1257EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1258SELECT * FROM (
1259    SELECT 1 AS type,c1 FROM ft1
1260    UNION ALL
1261    SELECT 2 AS type,c1 FROM ft2
1262) a ORDER BY type,c1;
1263                                   QUERY PLAN                                    
1264---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1265 Merge Append
1266   Sort Key: (1), ft1.c1
1267   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1268         Output: 1, ft1.c1
1269         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
1270   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
1271         Output: 2, ft2.c1
1272         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
1273(8 rows)
1274
1275EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1276SELECT * FROM (
1277    SELECT 1 AS type,c1 FROM ft1
1278    UNION ALL
1279    SELECT 2 AS type,c1 FROM ft2
1280) a ORDER BY type;
1281                    QUERY PLAN                     
1282---------------------------------------------------
1283 Merge Append
1284   Sort Key: (1)
1285   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
1286         Output: 1, ft1.c1
1287         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1"
1288   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
1289         Output: 2, ft2.c1
1290         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1"
1291(8 rows)
1292
1293-- ===================================================================
1294-- JOIN queries
1295-- ===================================================================
1296-- Analyze ft4 and ft5 so that we have better statistics. These tables do not
1297-- have use_remote_estimate set.
1298ANALYZE ft4;
1299ANALYZE ft5;
1300-- join two tables
1301EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1302SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
1303                                                                                                       QUERY PLAN                                                                                                       
1304------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1305 Foreign Scan
1306   Output: t1.c1, t2.c1, t1.c3
1307   Relations: (public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
1308   Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1", r1.c3 FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1")))) ORDER BY r1.c3 ASC NULLS LAST, r1."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10::bigint OFFSET 100::bigint
1309(4 rows)
1310
1311SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
1312 c1  | c1  
1313-----+-----
1314 101 | 101
1315 102 | 102
1316 103 | 103
1317 104 | 104
1318 105 | 105
1319 106 | 106
1320 107 | 107
1321 108 | 108
1322 109 | 109
1323 110 | 110
1324(10 rows)
1325
1326-- join three tables
1327EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1328SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2, t3.c3 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) JOIN ft4 t3 ON (t3.c1 = t1.c1) ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;
1329                                                                                                                                   QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                    
1330---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1331 Foreign Scan
1332   Output: t1.c1, t2.c2, t3.c3, t1.c3
1333   Relations: ((public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)) INNER JOIN (public.ft4 t3)
1334   Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2.c2, r4.c3, r1.c3 FROM (("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1")))) INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 3" r4 ON (((r1."C 1" = r4.c1)))) ORDER BY r1.c3 ASC NULLS LAST, r1."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10::bigint OFFSET 10::bigint
1335(4 rows)
1336
1337SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2, t3.c3 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) JOIN ft4 t3 ON (t3.c1 = t1.c1) ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;

1339----+----+--------
1340 22 |  2 | AAA022
1341 24 |  4 | AAA024
1342 26 |  6 | AAA026
1343 28 |  8 | AAA028
1344 30 |  0 | AAA030
1345 32 |  2 | AAA032
1346 34 |  4 | AAA034
1347 36 |  6 | AAA036
1348 38 |  8 | AAA038
1349 40 |  0 | AAA040
1350(10 rows)

1378-- left outer join three tables

1387(4 rows)

1403
1404-- left outer join + placement of clauses.
1405-- clauses within the nullable side are not pulled up, but top level clause on
1406-- non-nullable side is pushed into non-nullable side
1407EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1408SELECT t1.c1, t1.c2, t2.c1, t2.c2 FROM ft4 t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM ft5 WHERE c1 < 10) t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) WHERE t1.c1 < 10;
1409                                                                          QUERY PLAN                                                                           
1410---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1411 Foreign Scan
1412   Output: t1.c1, t1.c2, ft5.c1, ft5.c2
1413   Relations: (public.ft4 t1) LEFT JOIN (public.ft5)
1414   Remote SQL: SELECT r1.c1, r1.c2, r4.c1, r4.c2 FROM ("S 1"."T 3" r1 LEFT JOIN "S 1"."T 4" r4 ON (((r1.c1 = r4.c1)) AND ((r4.c1 < 10)))) WHERE ((r1.c1 < 10))
1415(4 rows)
1416
1417SELECT t1.c1, t1.c2, t2.c1, t2.c2 FROM ft4 t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM ft5 WHERE c1 < 10) t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) WHERE t1.c1 < 10;

1419----+----+----+----
1420  2 |  3 |    |   
1421  4 |  5 |    |   
1422  6 |  7 |  6 |  7
1423  8 |  9 |    |   
1424(4 rows)
1425
1426-- clauses within the nullable side are not pulled up, but the top level clause
1427-- on nullable side is not pushed down into nullable side
1428EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1429SELECT t1.c1, t1.c2, t2.c1, t2.c2 FROM ft4 t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM ft5 WHERE c1 < 10) t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1)
1430			WHERE (t2.c1 < 10 OR t2.c1 IS NULL) AND t1.c1 < 10;
1431                                                                                              QUERY PLAN                                                                                               
1432-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1433 Foreign Scan
1434   Output: t1.c1, t1.c2, ft5.c1, ft5.c2
1435   Relations: (public.ft4 t1) LEFT JOIN (public.ft5)

1437(4 rows)
1438
1439SELECT t1.c1, t1.c2, t2.c1, t2.c2 FROM ft4 t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM ft5 WHERE c1 < 10) t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1)
1440			WHERE (t2.c1 < 10 OR t2.c1 IS NULL) AND t1.c1 < 10;

1527-- full outer join with restrictions on the joining relations
1528-- a. the joining relations are both base relations
1529EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1530SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM (SELECT c1 FROM ft4 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t1 FULL JOIN (SELECT c1 FROM ft5 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1;

1532-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1533 Foreign Scan
1534   Output: ft4.c1, ft5.c1
1535   Relations: (public.ft4) FULL JOIN (public.ft5)
1536   Remote SQL: SELECT s4.c1, s5.c1 FROM ((SELECT c1 FROM "S 1"."T 3" WHERE ((c1 >= 50)) AND ((c1 <= 60))) s4(c1) FULL JOIN (SELECT c1 FROM "S 1"."T 4" WHERE ((c1 >= 50)) AND ((c1 <= 60))) s5(c1) ON (((s4.c1 = s5.c1)))) ORDER BY s4.c1 ASC NULLS LAST, s5.c1 ASC NULLS LAST
1537(4 rows)

1577-- b. one of the joining relations is a base relation and the other is a join
1578-- relation
1579EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1580SELECT t1.c1, ss.a, ss.b FROM (SELECT c1 FROM ft4 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t1 FULL JOIN (SELECT t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM ft4 t2 LEFT JOIN ft5 t3 ON (t2.c1 = t3.c1) WHERE (t2.c1 between 50 and 60)) ss(a, b) ON (t1.c1 = ss.a) ORDER BY t1.c1, ss.a, ss.b;

1582-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1587(4 rows)

1600-- c. test deparsing the remote query as nested subqueries
1601EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1602SELECT t1.c1, ss.a, ss.b FROM (SELECT c1 FROM ft4 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t1 FULL JOIN (SELECT t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM (SELECT c1 FROM ft4 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t2 FULL JOIN (SELECT c1 FROM ft5 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t3 ON (t2.c1 = t3.c1) WHERE t2.c1 IS NULL OR t2.c1 IS NOT NULL) ss(a, b) ON (t1.c1 = ss.a) ORDER BY t1.c1, ss.a, ss.b;
1603                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
1604--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1605 Foreign Scan
1606   Output: ft4.c1, ft4_1.c1, ft5.c1
1607   Relations: (public.ft4) FULL JOIN ((public.ft4 ft4_1) FULL JOIN (public.ft5))

1609(4 rows)
1610

1624-- d. test deparsing rowmarked relations as subqueries
1625EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1626SELECT t1.c1, ss.a, ss.b FROM (SELECT c1 FROM "S 1"."T 3" WHERE c1 = 50) t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM (SELECT c1 FROM ft4 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t2 FULL JOIN (SELECT c1 FROM ft5 WHERE c1 between 50 and 60) t3 ON (t2.c1 = t3.c1) WHERE t2.c1 IS NULL OR t2.c1 IS NOT NULL) ss(a, b) ON (TRUE) ORDER BY t1.c1, ss.a, ss.b FOR UPDATE OF t1;
1627                                                                                                                                                                                             QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                                             
1628----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1629 LockRows
1630   Output: "T 3".c1, ft4.c1, ft5.c1, "T 3".ctid, ft4.*, ft5.*
1631   ->  Nested Loop
1632         Output: "T 3".c1, ft4.c1, ft5.c1, "T 3".ctid, ft4.*, ft5.*
1633         ->  Foreign Scan
1634               Output: ft4.c1, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.*
1635               Relations: (public.ft4) FULL JOIN (public.ft5)
1636               Remote SQL: SELECT s8.c1, s8.c2, s9.c1, s9.c2 FROM ((SELECT c1, ROW(c1, c2, c3) FROM "S 1"."T 3" WHERE ((c1 >= 50)) AND ((c1 <= 60))) s8(c1, c2) FULL JOIN (SELECT c1, ROW(c1, c2, c3) FROM "S 1"."T 4" WHERE ((c1 >= 50)) AND ((c1 <= 60))) s9(c1, c2) ON (((s8.c1 = s9.c1)))) WHERE (((s8.c1 IS NULL) OR (s8.c1 IS NOT NULL))) ORDER BY s8.c1 ASC NULLS LAST, s9.c1 ASC NULLS LAST
1637               ->  Sort
1638                     Output: ft4.c1, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.*
1639                     Sort Key: ft4.c1, ft5.c1
1640                     ->  Hash Full Join
1641                           Output: ft4.c1, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.*
1642                           Hash Cond: (ft4.c1 = ft5.c1)
1643                           Filter: ((ft4.c1 IS NULL) OR (ft4.c1 IS NOT NULL))
1644                           ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4
1645                                 Output: ft4.c1, ft4.*
1646                                 Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 3" WHERE ((c1 >= 50)) AND ((c1 <= 60))
1647                           ->  Hash
1648                                 Output: ft5.c1, ft5.*
1649                                 ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft5
1650                                       Output: ft5.c1, ft5.*
1651                                       Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 4" WHERE ((c1 >= 50)) AND ((c1 <= 60))
1652         ->  Materialize
1653               Output: "T 3".c1, "T 3".ctid
1654               ->  Seq Scan on "S 1"."T 3"
1655                     Output: "T 3".c1, "T 3".ctid
1656                     Filter: ("T 3".c1 = 50)
1657(28 rows)

1913-- full outer join + WHERE clause with shippable extensions set
1914EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1915SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2, t1.c3 FROM ft1 t1 FULL JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) WHERE postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c1) > 0 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;
1916                                                                                                 QUERY PLAN                                                                                                 
1917------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1918 Foreign Scan
1919   Output: t1.c1, t2.c2, t1.c3
1920   Relations: (public.ft1 t1) FULL JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
1921   Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2.c2, r1.c3 FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 FULL JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r1."C 1" = r2."C 1")))) WHERE ((public.postgres_fdw_abs(r1."C 1") > 0)) LIMIT 10::bigint OFFSET 10::bigint
1922(4 rows)
1923
1924ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (DROP extensions);
1925-- full outer join + WHERE clause with shippable extensions not set
1926EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1927SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2, t1.c3 FROM ft1 t1 FULL JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) WHERE postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c1) > 0 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;
1928                                                          QUERY PLAN                                                           
1929-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1930 Limit
1931   Output: t1.c1, t2.c2, t1.c3
1932   ->  Foreign Scan
1933         Output: t1.c1, t2.c2, t1.c3
1934         Filter: (postgres_fdw_abs(t1.c1) > 0)
1935         Relations: (public.ft1 t1) FULL JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
1936         Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2.c2, r1.c3 FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 FULL JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r1."C 1" = r2."C 1"))))
1937(7 rows)
1938
1939ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (ADD extensions 'postgres_fdw');
1940-- join two tables with FOR UPDATE clause
1941-- tests whole-row reference for row marks
1942EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
1943SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10 FOR UPDATE OF t1;
1944                                                                                                                                                                                                                           QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
1945-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1946 Foreign Scan
1947   Output: t1.c1, t2.c1, t1.c3, t1.*, t2.*
1948   Relations: (public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
1949   Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1", r1.c3, CASE WHEN (r1.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r1."C 1", r1.c2, r1.c3, r1.c4, r1.c5, r1.c6, r1.c7, r1.c8) END, CASE WHEN (r2.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r2."C 1", r2.c2, r2.c3, r2.c4, r2.c5, r2.c6, r2.c7, r2.c8) END FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1")))) ORDER BY r1.c3 ASC NULLS LAST, r1."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10::bigint OFFSET 100::bigint FOR UPDATE OF r1
1950(4 rows)
1951

2043-- join in CTE
2044EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2045WITH t (c1_1, c1_3, c2_1) AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT t1.c1, t1.c3, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1)) SELECT c1_1, c2_1 FROM t ORDER BY c1_3, c1_1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
2046                                                             QUERY PLAN                                                              
2047-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2048 Limit
2049   Output: t.c1_1, t.c2_1, t.c1_3
2050   CTE t
2051     ->  Foreign Scan
2052           Output: t1.c1, t1.c3, t2.c1
2053           Relations: (public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
2054           Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r1.c3, r2."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1"))))
2055   ->  Sort
2056         Output: t.c1_1, t.c2_1, t.c1_3
2057         Sort Key: t.c1_3, t.c1_1
2058         ->  CTE Scan on t
2059               Output: t.c1_1, t.c2_1, t.c1_3
2060(12 rows)

2198-- unsafe join conditions (c8 has a UDT), not pushed down. Practically a CROSS
2199-- JOIN since c8 in both tables has same value.
2200EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2201SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 LEFT JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c8 = t2.c8) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;

2203-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2204 Limit
2205   Output: t1.c1, t2.c1
2206   ->  Sort
2207         Output: t1.c1, t2.c1
2208         Sort Key: t1.c1, t2.c1
2209         ->  Merge Left Join
2210               Output: t1.c1, t2.c1
2211               Merge Cond: (t1.c8 = t2.c8)
2212               ->  Sort
2213                     Output: t1.c1, t1.c8
2214                     Sort Key: t1.c8
2215                     ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
2216                           Output: t1.c1, t1.c8
2217                           Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
2218               ->  Sort
2219                     Output: t2.c1, t2.c8
2220                     Sort Key: t2.c8
2221                     ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2 t2
2222                           Output: t2.c1, t2.c8
2223                           Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
2224(20 rows)
2225

2280-- join where unsafe to pushdown condition in WHERE clause has a column not
2281-- in the SELECT clause. In this test unsafe clause needs to have column
2282-- references from both joining sides so that the clause is not pushed down
2283-- into one of the joining sides.

2293         ->  Foreign Scan

2295               Filter: (t1.c8 = t2.c8)
2296               Relations: (public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
2297               Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1", r1.c3, r1.c8, r2.c8 FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1"))))
