2315-- Aggregate after UNION, for testing setrefs
2316EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2317SELECT t1c1, avg(t1c1 + t2c1) FROM (SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) UNION SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1)) AS t (t1c1, t2c1) GROUP BY t1c1 ORDER BY t1c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
2318                                                                     QUERY PLAN                                                                     
2319----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2320 Limit
2321   Output: t1.c1, (avg((t1.c1 + t2.c1)))
2322   ->  Sort
2323         Output: t1.c1, (avg((t1.c1 + t2.c1)))
2324         Sort Key: t1.c1
2325         ->  HashAggregate
2326               Output: t1.c1, avg((t1.c1 + t2.c1))
2327               Group Key: t1.c1
2328               ->  HashAggregate
2329                     Output: t1.c1, t2.c1
2330                     Group Key: t1.c1, t2.c1
2331                     ->  Append
2332                           ->  Foreign Scan
2333                                 Output: t1.c1, t2.c1
2334                                 Relations: (public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
2335                                 Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1"))))
2336                           ->  Foreign Scan
2337                                 Output: t1_1.c1, t2_1.c1
2338                                 Relations: (public.ft1 t1_1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2_1)
2339                                 Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1"))))
2340(20 rows)
2341
2342SELECT t1c1, avg(t1c1 + t2c1) FROM (SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) UNION SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1)) AS t (t1c1, t2c1) GROUP BY t1c1 ORDER BY t1c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
2343 t1c1 |         avg          
2344------+----------------------
2345  101 | 202.0000000000000000
2346  102 | 204.0000000000000000
2347  103 | 206.0000000000000000
2348  104 | 208.0000000000000000
2349  105 | 210.0000000000000000
2350  106 | 212.0000000000000000
2351  107 | 214.0000000000000000
2352  108 | 216.0000000000000000
2353  109 | 218.0000000000000000
2354  110 | 220.0000000000000000
2355(10 rows)
2356
2357-- join with lateral reference
2358EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2359SELECT t1."C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1, LATERAL (SELECT DISTINCT t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM ft1 t2, ft2 t3 WHERE t2.c1 = t3.c1 AND t2.c2 = t1.c2) q ORDER BY t1."C 1" OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;
2360                                                                                   QUERY PLAN                                                                                   
2361--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2362 Limit
2363   Output: t1."C 1"
2364   ->  Nested Loop
2365         Output: t1."C 1"
2366         ->  Index Scan using t1_pkey on "S 1"."T 1" t1
2367               Output: t1."C 1", t1.c2, t1.c3, t1.c4, t1.c5, t1.c6, t1.c7, t1.c8
2368         ->  Memoize
2369               Cache Key: t1.c2
2370               Cache Mode: binary
2371               ->  Subquery Scan on q
2372                     ->  HashAggregate
2373                           Output: t2.c1, t3.c1
2374                           Group Key: t2.c1
2375                           ->  Foreign Scan
2376                                 Output: t2.c1, t3.c1
2377                                 Relations: (public.ft1 t2) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t3)
2378                                 Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1")) AND ((r1.c2 = $1::integer))))
2379(17 rows)
2380
2381SELECT t1."C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" t1, LATERAL (SELECT DISTINCT t2.c1, t3.c1 FROM ft1 t2, ft2 t3 WHERE t2.c1 = t3.c1 AND t2.c2 = t1.c2) q ORDER BY t1."C 1" OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;
2382 C 1 
2383-----
2384   1
2385   1
2386   1
2387   1
2388   1
2389   1
2390   1
2391   1
2392   1
2393   1
2394(10 rows)
2395
2396-- join with pseudoconstant quals
2397EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2398SELECT t1.c1, t2.c1 FROM ft1 t1 JOIN ft2 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1 AND CURRENT_USER = SESSION_USER) ORDER BY t1.c3, t1.c1 OFFSET 100 LIMIT 10;
2399                                                                                           QUERY PLAN                                                                                           
2400------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2401 Limit
2402   Output: t1.c1, t2.c1, t1.c3
2403   ->  Result
2404         Output: t1.c1, t2.c1, t1.c3
2405         One-Time Filter: (CURRENT_USER = SESSION_USER)
2406         ->  Foreign Scan
2407               Output: t1.c1, t1.c3, t2.c1
2408               Relations: (public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
2409               Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1", r1.c3 FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1")))) ORDER BY r1.c3 ASC NULLS LAST, r1."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
2410(9 rows)
2411
2412-- non-Var items in targetlist of the nullable rel of a join preventing
2413-- push-down in some cases
2414-- unable to push {ft1, ft2}
2415EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2416SELECT q.a, ft2.c1 FROM (SELECT 13 FROM ft1 WHERE c1 = 13) q(a) RIGHT JOIN ft2 ON (q.a = ft2.c1) WHERE ft2.c1 BETWEEN 10 AND 15;
2417                                                        QUERY PLAN                                                         
2418---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2419 Nested Loop Left Join
2420   Output: (13), ft2.c1
2421   Join Filter: (13 = ft2.c1)
2422   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
2423         Output: ft2.c1
2424         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" >= 10)) AND (("C 1" <= 15)) ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
2425   ->  Materialize
2426         Output: (13)
2427         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
2428               Output: 13
2429               Remote SQL: SELECT NULL FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 13))
2430(11 rows)
2431
2432SELECT q.a, ft2.c1 FROM (SELECT 13 FROM ft1 WHERE c1 = 13) q(a) RIGHT JOIN ft2 ON (q.a = ft2.c1) WHERE ft2.c1 BETWEEN 10 AND 15;
2433 a  | c1 
2434----+----
2435    | 10
2436    | 11
2437    | 12
2438 13 | 13
2439    | 14
2440    | 15
2441(6 rows)
2442
2443-- ok to push {ft1, ft2} but not {ft1, ft2, ft4}
2444EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2445SELECT ft4.c1, q.* FROM ft4 LEFT JOIN (SELECT 13, ft1.c1, ft2.c1 FROM ft1 RIGHT JOIN ft2 ON (ft1.c1 = ft2.c1) WHERE ft1.c1 = 12) q(a, b, c) ON (ft4.c1 = q.b) WHERE ft4.c1 BETWEEN 10 AND 15;
2446                                                                                    QUERY PLAN                                                                                     
2447-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2448 Nested Loop Left Join
2449   Output: ft4.c1, (13), ft1.c1, ft2.c1
2450   Join Filter: (ft4.c1 = ft1.c1)
2451   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4
2452         Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3
2453         Remote SQL: SELECT c1 FROM "S 1"."T 3" WHERE ((c1 >= 10)) AND ((c1 <= 15))
2454   ->  Materialize
2455         Output: ft1.c1, ft2.c1, (13)
2456         ->  Foreign Scan
2457               Output: ft1.c1, ft2.c1, 13
2458               Relations: (public.ft1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2)
2459               Remote SQL: SELECT r4."C 1", r5."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r4 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r5 ON (((r5."C 1" = 12)) AND ((r4."C 1" = 12)))) ORDER BY r4."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
2460(12 rows)
2461
2462SELECT ft4.c1, q.* FROM ft4 LEFT JOIN (SELECT 13, ft1.c1, ft2.c1 FROM ft1 RIGHT JOIN ft2 ON (ft1.c1 = ft2.c1) WHERE ft1.c1 = 12) q(a, b, c) ON (ft4.c1 = q.b) WHERE ft4.c1 BETWEEN 10 AND 15;
2463 c1 | a  | b  | c  
2464----+----+----+----
2465 10 |    |    |   
2466 12 | 13 | 12 | 12
2467 14 |    |    |   
2468(3 rows)
2469
2470-- join with nullable side with some columns with null values
2471UPDATE ft5 SET c3 = null where c1 % 9 = 0;
2472EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2473SELECT ft5, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft4.c1, ft4.c2 FROM ft5 left join ft4 on ft5.c1 = ft4.c1 WHERE ft4.c1 BETWEEN 10 and 30 ORDER BY ft5.c1, ft4.c1;
2474                                                                                                                                QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                 
2475---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2476 Foreign Scan
2477   Output: ft5.*, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft4.c1, ft4.c2
2478   Relations: (public.ft5) INNER JOIN (public.ft4)
2479   Remote SQL: SELECT CASE WHEN (r1.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r1.c1, r1.c2, r1.c3) END, r1.c1, r1.c2, r1.c3, r2.c1, r2.c2 FROM ("S 1"."T 4" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 3" r2 ON (((r1.c1 = r2.c1)) AND ((r2.c1 >= 10)) AND ((r2.c1 <= 30)))) ORDER BY r1.c1 ASC NULLS LAST
2480(4 rows)
2481
2482SELECT ft5, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft4.c1, ft4.c2 FROM ft5 left join ft4 on ft5.c1 = ft4.c1 WHERE ft4.c1 BETWEEN 10 and 30 ORDER BY ft5.c1, ft4.c1;
2483      ft5       | c1 | c2 |   c3   | c1 | c2 
2484----------------+----+----+--------+----+----
2485 (12,13,AAA012) | 12 | 13 | AAA012 | 12 | 13
2486 (18,19,)       | 18 | 19 |        | 18 | 19
2487 (24,25,AAA024) | 24 | 25 | AAA024 | 24 | 25
2488 (30,31,AAA030) | 30 | 31 | AAA030 | 30 | 31
2489(4 rows)
2490
2491-- multi-way join involving multiple merge joins
2492-- (this case used to have EPQ-related planning problems)
2493CREATE TABLE local_tbl (c1 int NOT NULL, c2 int NOT NULL, c3 text, CONSTRAINT local_tbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (c1));
2494INSERT INTO local_tbl SELECT id, id % 10, to_char(id, 'FM0000') FROM generate_series(1, 1000) id;
2495ANALYZE local_tbl;
2496SET enable_nestloop TO false;
2497SET enable_hashjoin TO false;
2498EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2499SELECT * FROM ft1, ft2, ft4, ft5, local_tbl WHERE ft1.c1 = ft2.c1 AND ft1.c2 = ft4.c1
2500    AND ft1.c2 = ft5.c1 AND ft1.c2 = local_tbl.c1 AND ft1.c1 < 100 AND ft2.c1 < 100 FOR UPDATE;
2501                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
2502--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2503 LockRows
2504   Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.*, ft2.*, ft4.*, ft5.*, local_tbl.ctid
2505   ->  Merge Join
2506         Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.*, ft2.*, ft4.*, ft5.*, local_tbl.ctid
2507         Inner Unique: true
2508         Merge Cond: (ft1.c2 = local_tbl.c1)
2509         ->  Foreign Scan
2510               Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft2.*, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2511               Relations: (((public.ft1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2)) INNER JOIN (public.ft4)) INNER JOIN (public.ft5)
2512               Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r1.c2, r1.c3, r1.c4, r1.c5, r1.c6, r1.c7, r1.c8, CASE WHEN (r1.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r1."C 1", r1.c2, r1.c3, r1.c4, r1.c5, r1.c6, r1.c7, r1.c8) END, r2."C 1", r2.c2, r2.c3, r2.c4, r2.c5, r2.c6, r2.c7, r2.c8, CASE WHEN (r2.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r2."C 1", r2.c2, r2.c3, r2.c4, r2.c5, r2.c6, r2.c7, r2.c8) END, r3.c1, r3.c2, r3.c3, CASE WHEN (r3.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r3.c1, r3.c2, r3.c3) END, r4.c1, r4.c2, r4.c3, CASE WHEN (r4.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r4.c1, r4.c2, r4.c3) END FROM ((("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1")) AND ((r2."C 1" < 100)) AND ((r1."C 1" < 100)))) INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 3" r3 ON (((r1.c2 = r3.c1)))) INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 4" r4 ON (((r1.c2 = r4.c1)))) ORDER BY r1.c2 ASC NULLS LAST FOR UPDATE OF r1 FOR UPDATE OF r2 FOR UPDATE OF r3 FOR UPDATE OF r4
2513               ->  Merge Join
2514                     Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft2.*, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2515                     Merge Cond: (ft1.c2 = ft5.c1)
2516                     ->  Merge Join
2517                           Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft2.*, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*
2518                           Merge Cond: (ft1.c2 = ft4.c1)
2519                           ->  Sort
2520                                 Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft2.*
2521                                 Sort Key: ft1.c2
2522                                 ->  Merge Join
2523                                       Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft2.*
2524                                       Merge Cond: (ft1.c1 = ft2.c1)
2525                                       ->  Sort
2526                                             Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*
2527                                             Sort Key: ft1.c1
2528                                             ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
2529                                                   Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*
2530                                                   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" < 100)) FOR UPDATE
2531                                       ->  Materialize
2532                                             Output: ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft2.*
2533                                             ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
2534                                                   Output: ft2.c1, ft2.c2, ft2.c3, ft2.c4, ft2.c5, ft2.c6, ft2.c7, ft2.c8, ft2.*
2535                                                   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" < 100)) ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST FOR UPDATE
2536                           ->  Sort
2537                                 Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*
2538                                 Sort Key: ft4.c1
2539                                 ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4
2540                                       Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*
2541                                       Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 3" FOR UPDATE
2542                     ->  Sort
2543                           Output: ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2544                           Sort Key: ft5.c1
2545                           ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft5
2546                                 Output: ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2547                                 Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 4" FOR UPDATE
2548         ->  Index Scan using local_tbl_pkey on public.local_tbl
2549               Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, local_tbl.ctid
2550(47 rows)
2551
2552SELECT * FROM ft1, ft2, ft4, ft5, local_tbl WHERE ft1.c1 = ft2.c1 AND ft1.c2 = ft4.c1
2553    AND ft1.c2 = ft5.c1 AND ft1.c2 = local_tbl.c1 AND ft1.c1 < 100 AND ft2.c1 < 100 FOR UPDATE;

2566(10 rows)
2567
2568EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2569SELECT * FROM ft1, ft4, ft5, local_tbl WHERE ft1.c1 = ft4.c1 AND ft1.c1 = ft5.c1
2570    AND ft1.c2 = local_tbl.c1 AND ft1.c1 < 100 AND ft5.c1 < 100 FOR UPDATE;
2571                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
2572----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2573 LockRows
2574   Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.*, ft4.*, ft5.*, local_tbl.ctid
2575   ->  Merge Join
2576         Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.*, ft4.*, ft5.*, local_tbl.ctid
2577         Merge Cond: (local_tbl.c1 = ft1.c2)
2578         ->  Index Scan using local_tbl_pkey on public.local_tbl
2579               Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, local_tbl.ctid
2580         ->  Sort
2581               Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2582               Sort Key: ft1.c2
2583               ->  Foreign Scan
2584                     Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2585                     Relations: ((public.ft1) INNER JOIN (public.ft4)) INNER JOIN (public.ft5)
2586                     Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r1.c2, r1.c3, r1.c4, r1.c5, r1.c6, r1.c7, r1.c8, CASE WHEN (r1.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r1."C 1", r1.c2, r1.c3, r1.c4, r1.c5, r1.c6, r1.c7, r1.c8) END, r2.c1, r2.c2, r2.c3, CASE WHEN (r2.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r2.c1, r2.c2, r2.c3) END, r3.c1, r3.c2, r3.c3, CASE WHEN (r3.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r3.c1, r3.c2, r3.c3) END FROM (("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 3" r2 ON (((r1."C 1" = r2.c1)) AND ((r1."C 1" < 100)))) INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 4" r3 ON (((r1."C 1" = r3.c1)) AND ((r3.c1 < 100)))) FOR UPDATE OF r1 FOR UPDATE OF r2 FOR UPDATE OF r3
2587                     ->  Merge Join
2588                           Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*, ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2589                           Merge Cond: (ft1.c1 = ft5.c1)
2590                           ->  Merge Join
2591                                 Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*
2592                                 Merge Cond: (ft1.c1 = ft4.c1)
2593                                 ->  Sort
2594                                       Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*
2595                                       Sort Key: ft1.c1
2596                                       ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
2597                                             Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*
2598                                             Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" < 100)) FOR UPDATE
2599                                 ->  Sort
2600                                       Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*
2601                                       Sort Key: ft4.c1
2602                                       ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4
2603                                             Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3, ft4.*
2604                                             Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 3" FOR UPDATE
2605                           ->  Sort
2606                                 Output: ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2607                                 Sort Key: ft5.c1
2608                                 ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft5
2609                                       Output: ft5.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c3, ft5.*
2610                                       Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 4" WHERE ((c1 < 100)) FOR UPDATE

2614    AND ft1.c2 = local_tbl.c1 AND ft1.c1 < 100 AND ft5.c1 < 100 FOR UPDATE;

2632RESET enable_nestloop;
2633RESET enable_hashjoin;
2634-- test that add_paths_with_pathkeys_for_rel() arranges for the epq_path to
2635-- return columns needed by the parent ForeignScan node
2636EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2637SELECT * FROM local_tbl LEFT JOIN (SELECT ft1.*, COALESCE(ft1.c3 || ft2.c3, 'foobar') FROM ft1 INNER JOIN ft2 ON (ft1.c1 = ft2.c1 AND ft1.c1 < 100)) ss ON (local_tbl.c1 = ss.c1) ORDER BY local_tbl.c1 FOR UPDATE OF local_tbl;
2638                                                                                                                                                                                                                              QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
2639----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2640 LockRows
2641   Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, (COALESCE((ft1.c3 || ft2.c3), 'foobar'::text)), local_tbl.ctid, ft1.*, ft2.*
2642   ->  Merge Left Join
2643         Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, (COALESCE((ft1.c3 || ft2.c3), 'foobar'::text)), local_tbl.ctid, ft1.*, ft2.*
2644         Merge Cond: (local_tbl.c1 = ft1.c1)
2645         ->  Index Scan using local_tbl_pkey on public.local_tbl
2646               Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, local_tbl.ctid
2647         ->  Materialize
2648               Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*, (COALESCE((ft1.c3 || ft2.c3), 'foobar'::text))
2649               ->  Foreign Scan
2650                     Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*, COALESCE((ft1.c3 || ft2.c3), 'foobar'::text)
2651                     Relations: (public.ft1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2)
2652                     Remote SQL: SELECT r4."C 1", r4.c2, r4.c3, r4.c4, r4.c5, r4.c6, r4.c7, r4.c8, CASE WHEN (r4.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r4."C 1", r4.c2, r4.c3, r4.c4, r4.c5, r4.c6, r4.c7, r4.c8) END, CASE WHEN (r5.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r5."C 1", r5.c2, r5.c3, r5.c4, r5.c5, r5.c6, r5.c7, r5.c8) END, r5.c3 FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r4 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r5 ON (((r5."C 1" = r4."C 1")) AND ((r4."C 1" < 100)))) ORDER BY r4."C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
2653                     ->  Result
2654                           Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*, ft2.c3
2655                           ->  Sort
2656                                 Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*, (COALESCE((ft1.c3 || ft2.c3), 'foobar'::text)), ft2.c3
2657                                 Sort Key: ft1.c1
2658                                 ->  Hash Join
2659                                       Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*, COALESCE((ft1.c3 || ft2.c3), 'foobar'::text), ft2.c3
2660                                       Hash Cond: (ft1.c1 = ft2.c1)
2661                                       ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
2662                                             Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*
2663                                             Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" < 100))
2664                                       ->  Hash
2665                                             Output: ft2.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c3
2666                                             ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
2667                                                   Output: ft2.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c3
2668                                                   Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
2669(29 rows)
2670
2671ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (DROP extensions);
2672ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (ADD fdw_startup_cost '10000.0');
2673EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2674SELECT * FROM local_tbl LEFT JOIN (SELECT ft1.* FROM ft1 INNER JOIN ft2 ON (ft1.c1 = ft2.c1 AND ft1.c1 < 100 AND (ft1.c1 - postgres_fdw_abs(ft2.c2)) = 0)) ss ON (local_tbl.c3 = ss.c3) ORDER BY local_tbl.c1 FOR UPDATE OF local_tbl;
2675                                                                                                                                                                                                                            QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
2676-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2677 LockRows
2678   Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, local_tbl.ctid, ft1.*, ft2.*
2679   ->  Nested Loop Left Join
2680         Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, local_tbl.ctid, ft1.*, ft2.*
2681         Join Filter: (local_tbl.c3 = ft1.c3)
2682         ->  Index Scan using local_tbl_pkey on public.local_tbl
2683               Output: local_tbl.c1, local_tbl.c2, local_tbl.c3, local_tbl.ctid
2684         ->  Materialize
2685               Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*
2686               ->  Foreign Scan
2687                     Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*
2688                     Filter: ((ft1.c1 - postgres_fdw_abs(ft2.c2)) = 0)
2689                     Relations: (public.ft1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2)
2690                     Remote SQL: SELECT r4."C 1", r4.c2, r4.c3, r4.c4, r4.c5, r4.c6, r4.c7, r4.c8, CASE WHEN (r4.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r4."C 1", r4.c2, r4.c3, r4.c4, r4.c5, r4.c6, r4.c7, r4.c8) END, CASE WHEN (r5.*)::text IS NOT NULL THEN ROW(r5."C 1", r5.c2, r5.c3, r5.c4, r5.c5, r5.c6, r5.c7, r5.c8) END, r5.c2 FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r4 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r5 ON (((r5."C 1" = r4."C 1")) AND ((r4."C 1" < 100)))) ORDER BY r4.c3 ASC NULLS LAST
2691                     ->  Sort
2692                           Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*, ft2.c2
2693                           Sort Key: ft1.c3
2694                           ->  Merge Join
2695                                 Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*, ft2.*, ft2.c2
2696                                 Merge Cond: (ft1.c1 = ft2.c1)
2697                                 Join Filter: ((ft1.c1 - postgres_fdw_abs(ft2.c2)) = 0)
2698                                 ->  Sort
2699                                       Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*
2700                                       Sort Key: ft1.c1
2701                                       ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
2702                                             Output: ft1.c1, ft1.c2, ft1.c3, ft1.c4, ft1.c5, ft1.c6, ft1.c7, ft1.c8, ft1.*
2703                                             Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" < 100))
2704                                 ->  Materialize
2705                                       Output: ft2.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c2
2706                                       ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
2707                                             Output: ft2.*, ft2.c1, ft2.c2
2708                                             Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8 FROM "S 1"."T 1" ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST
2709(32 rows)
2710
2711ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (DROP fdw_startup_cost);
2712ALTER SERVER loopback OPTIONS (ADD extensions 'postgres_fdw');
2713DROP TABLE local_tbl;
2714-- check join pushdown in situations where multiple userids are involved
2715CREATE ROLE regress_view_owner SUPERUSER;
2716CREATE USER MAPPING FOR regress_view_owner SERVER loopback;
2717GRANT SELECT ON ft4 TO regress_view_owner;
2718GRANT SELECT ON ft5 TO regress_view_owner;
2719CREATE VIEW v4 AS SELECT * FROM ft4;
2720CREATE VIEW v5 AS SELECT * FROM ft5;
2721ALTER VIEW v5 OWNER TO regress_view_owner;
2722EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF)
2723SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2 FROM v4 t1 LEFT JOIN v5 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;  -- can't be pushed down, different view owners
2724                              QUERY PLAN                              
2725----------------------------------------------------------------------
2726 Limit
2727   Output: ft4.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c1
2728   ->  Sort
2729         Output: ft4.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c1
2730         Sort Key: ft4.c1, ft5.c1
2731         ->  Hash Left Join
2732               Output: ft4.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c1
2733               Hash Cond: (ft4.c1 = ft5.c1)
2734               ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4
2735                     Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3
2736                     Remote SQL: SELECT c1 FROM "S 1"."T 3"
2737               ->  Hash
2738                     Output: ft5.c2, ft5.c1
2739                     ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft5
2740                           Output: ft5.c2, ft5.c1
2741                           Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2 FROM "S 1"."T 4"
2742(16 rows)
2743
2744SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2 FROM v4 t1 LEFT JOIN v5 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;
2745 c1 | c2 
2746----+----
2747 22 |   
2748 24 | 25
2749 26 |   
2750 28 |   
2751 30 | 31
2752 32 |   
2753 34 |   
2754 36 | 37
2755 38 |   
2756 40 |   
2757(10 rows)

2759ALTER VIEW v4 OWNER TO regress_view_owner;

2761SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2 FROM v4 t1 LEFT JOIN v5 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;  -- can be pushed down
2762                                                                                              QUERY PLAN                                                                                               
2763-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2764 Foreign Scan
2765   Output: ft4.c1, ft5.c2, ft5.c1
2766   Relations: (public.ft4) LEFT JOIN (public.ft5)
2767   Remote SQL: SELECT r4.c1, r5.c2, r5.c1 FROM ("S 1"."T 3" r4 LEFT JOIN "S 1"."T 4" r5 ON (((r4.c1 = r5.c1)))) ORDER BY r4.c1 ASC NULLS LAST, r5.c1 ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10::bigint OFFSET 10::bigint
2768(4 rows)
2769
2770SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2 FROM v4 t1 LEFT JOIN v5 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;

2786SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2 FROM v4 t1 LEFT JOIN ft5 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;  -- can't be pushed down, view owner not current user
2787                              QUERY PLAN                              
2788----------------------------------------------------------------------
2789 Limit
2790   Output: ft4.c1, t2.c2, t2.c1
2791   ->  Sort
2792         Output: ft4.c1, t2.c2, t2.c1

2794         ->  Hash Left Join
2795               Output: ft4.c1, t2.c2, t2.c1
2796               Hash Cond: (ft4.c1 = t2.c1)
2797               ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4
2798                     Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3
2799                     Remote SQL: SELECT c1 FROM "S 1"."T 3"
2800               ->  Hash
2801                     Output: t2.c2, t2.c1
2802                     ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft5 t2
2803                           Output: t2.c2, t2.c1
2804                           Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2 FROM "S 1"."T 4"
2805(16 rows)

2824SELECT t1.c1, t2.c2 FROM v4 t1 LEFT JOIN ft5 t2 ON (t1.c1 = t2.c1) ORDER BY t1.c1, t2.c1 OFFSET 10 LIMIT 10;  -- can be pushed down

2826-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2827 Foreign Scan
2828   Output: ft4.c1, t2.c2, t2.c1
2829   Relations: (public.ft4) LEFT JOIN (public.ft5 t2)
2830   Remote SQL: SELECT r4.c1, r2.c2, r2.c1 FROM ("S 1"."T 3" r4 LEFT JOIN "S 1"."T 4" r2 ON (((r4.c1 = r2.c1)))) ORDER BY r4.c1 ASC NULLS LAST, r2.c1 ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10::bigint OFFSET 10::bigint
2831(4 rows)

2834 c1 | c2 
2835----+----
2836 22 |

2848ALTER VIEW v4 OWNER TO regress_view_owner;
2849-- ====================================================================
2850-- Check that userid to use when querying the remote table is correctly
2851-- propagated into foreign rels present in subqueries under an UNION ALL
2852-- ====================================================================
2853CREATE ROLE regress_view_owner_another;
2854ALTER VIEW v4 OWNER TO regress_view_owner_another;
2855GRANT SELECT ON ft4 TO regress_view_owner_another;
2856ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft4 OPTIONS (ADD use_remote_estimate 'true');
2857-- The following should query the remote backing table of ft4 as user
2858-- regress_view_owner_another, the view owner, though it fails as expected
2859-- due to the lack of a user mapping for that user.
2860EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM v4;
2861ERROR:  user mapping not found for user "regress_view_owner_another", server "loopback"
2862-- Likewise, but with the query under an UNION ALL
2863EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM v4 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM v4);
2864ERROR:  user mapping not found for user "regress_view_owner_another", server "loopback"
2865-- Should not get that error once a user mapping is created
2866CREATE USER MAPPING FOR regress_view_owner_another SERVER loopback OPTIONS (password_required 'false');
2867EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM v4;
2868                    QUERY PLAN                    
2869--------------------------------------------------
2870 Foreign Scan on public.ft4
2871   Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3
2872   Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 3"
2873(3 rows)
2874
2875EXPLAIN (VERBOSE, COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM v4 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM v4);
2876                       QUERY PLAN                       
2877--------------------------------------------------------
2878 Append
2879   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4
2880         Output: ft4.c1, ft4.c2, ft4.c3
2881         Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 3"
2882   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft4 ft4_1
2883         Output: ft4_1.c1, ft4_1.c2, ft4_1.c3
2884         Remote SQL: SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM "S 1"."T 3"
2885(7 rows)
2886
2887DROP USER MAPPING FOR regress_view_owner_another SERVER loopback;
2888DROP OWNED BY regress_view_owner_another;
2889DROP ROLE regress_view_owner_another;
2890ALTER FOREIGN TABLE ft4 OPTIONS (SET use_remote_estimate 'false');
2891-- cleanup
2892DROP OWNED BY regress_view_owner;
2893DROP ROLE regress_view_owner;
2894-- ===================================================================
2895-- Aggregate and grouping queries
2896-- ===================================================================
2897-- Simple aggregates
2898explain (verbose, costs off)
2899select count(c6), sum(c1), avg(c1), min(c2), max(c1), stddev(c2), sum(c1) * (random() <= 1)::int as sum2 from ft1 where c2 < 5 group by c2 order by 1, 2;
2900                                                                                              QUERY PLAN                                                                                               
2901-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2902 Foreign Scan
2903   Output: (count(c6)), (sum(c1)), (avg(c1)), (min(c2)), (max(c1)), (stddev(c2)), ((sum(c1)) * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer), c2
2904   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
2905   Remote SQL: SELECT count(c6), sum("C 1"), avg("C 1"), min(c2), max("C 1"), stddev(c2), c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c2 < 5)) GROUP BY 7 ORDER BY count(c6) ASC NULLS LAST, sum("C 1") ASC NULLS LAST
2906(4 rows)
2907
2908select count(c6), sum(c1), avg(c1), min(c2), max(c1), stddev(c2), sum(c1) * (random() <= 1)::int as sum2 from ft1 where c2 < 5 group by c2 order by 1, 2;
2909 count |  sum  |         avg          | min | max  | stddev | sum2  
2910-------+-------+----------------------+-----+------+--------+-------
2911   100 | 49600 | 496.0000000000000000 |   1 |  991 |      0 | 49600
2912   100 | 49700 | 497.0000000000000000 |   2 |  992 |      0 | 49700
2913   100 | 49800 | 498.0000000000000000 |   3 |  993 |      0 | 49800
2914   100 | 49900 | 499.0000000000000000 |   4 |  994 |      0 | 49900
2915   100 | 50500 | 505.0000000000000000 |   0 | 1000 |      0 | 50500
2916(5 rows)
2917
2918explain (verbose, costs off)
2919select count(c6), sum(c1), avg(c1), min(c2), max(c1), stddev(c2), sum(c1) * (random() <= 1)::int as sum2 from ft1 where c2 < 5 group by c2 order by 1, 2 limit 1;
2920                                                                                                      QUERY PLAN                                                                                                       
2921-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2922 Foreign Scan
2923   Output: (count(c6)), (sum(c1)), (avg(c1)), (min(c2)), (max(c1)), (stddev(c2)), ((sum(c1)) * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer), c2
2924   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
2925   Remote SQL: SELECT count(c6), sum("C 1"), avg("C 1"), min(c2), max("C 1"), stddev(c2), c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c2 < 5)) GROUP BY 7 ORDER BY count(c6) ASC NULLS LAST, sum("C 1") ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1::bigint
2926(4 rows)
2927
2928select count(c6), sum(c1), avg(c1), min(c2), max(c1), stddev(c2), sum(c1) * (random() <= 1)::int as sum2 from ft1 where c2 < 5 group by c2 order by 1, 2 limit 1;
2929 count |  sum  |         avg          | min | max | stddev | sum2  
2930-------+-------+----------------------+-----+-----+--------+-------
2931   100 | 49600 | 496.0000000000000000 |   1 | 991 |      0 | 49600
2932(1 row)
2933
2934-- Aggregate is not pushed down as aggregation contains random()
2935explain (verbose, costs off)
2936select sum(c1 * (random() <= 1)::int) as sum, avg(c1) from ft1;
2937                                  QUERY PLAN                                   
2938-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2939 Aggregate
2940   Output: sum((c1 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer)), avg(c1)
2941   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
2942         Output: c1
2943         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1"
2944(5 rows)
2945
2946-- Aggregate over join query
2947explain (verbose, costs off)
2948select count(*), sum(t1.c1), avg(t2.c1) from ft1 t1 inner join ft1 t2 on (t1.c2 = t2.c2) where t1.c2 = 6;
2949                                                                    QUERY PLAN                                                                    
2950--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2951 Foreign Scan
2952   Output: (count(*)), (sum(t1.c1)), (avg(t2.c1))
2953   Relations: Aggregate on ((public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft1 t2))
2954   Remote SQL: SELECT count(*), sum(r1."C 1"), avg(r2."C 1") FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2.c2 = 6)) AND ((r1.c2 = 6))))
2955(4 rows)
2956
2957select count(*), sum(t1.c1), avg(t2.c1) from ft1 t1 inner join ft1 t2 on (t1.c2 = t2.c2) where t1.c2 = 6;
2958 count |   sum   |         avg          
2959-------+---------+----------------------
2960 10000 | 5010000 | 501.0000000000000000
2961(1 row)
2962
2963-- Not pushed down due to local conditions present in underneath input rel
2964explain (verbose, costs off)
2965select sum(t1.c1), count(t2.c1) from ft1 t1 inner join ft2 t2 on (t1.c1 = t2.c1) where ((t1.c1 * t2.c1)/(t1.c1 * t2.c1)) * random() <= 1;
2966                                                         QUERY PLAN                                                         
2967----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2968 Aggregate
2969   Output: sum(t1.c1), count(t2.c1)
2970   ->  Foreign Scan
2971         Output: t1.c1, t2.c1
2972         Filter: (((((t1.c1 * t2.c1) / (t1.c1 * t2.c1)))::double precision * random()) <= '1'::double precision)
2973         Relations: (public.ft1 t1) INNER JOIN (public.ft2 t2)
2974         Remote SQL: SELECT r1."C 1", r2."C 1" FROM ("S 1"."T 1" r1 INNER JOIN "S 1"."T 1" r2 ON (((r2."C 1" = r1."C 1"))))
2975(7 rows)
2976
2977-- GROUP BY clause having expressions
2978explain (verbose, costs off)
2979select c2/2, sum(c2) * (c2/2) from ft1 group by c2/2 order by c2/2;
2980                                                    QUERY PLAN                                                    
2981------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2982 Foreign Scan
2983   Output: ((c2 / 2)), ((sum(c2) * (c2 / 2)))
2984   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
2985   Remote SQL: SELECT (c2 / 2), (sum(c2) * (c2 / 2)) FROM "S 1"."T 1" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY (c2 / 2) ASC NULLS LAST
2986(4 rows)
2987
2988select c2/2, sum(c2) * (c2/2) from ft1 group by c2/2 order by c2/2;
2989 ?column? | ?column? 
2990----------+----------
2991        0 |        0
2992        1 |      500
2993        2 |     1800
2994        3 |     3900
2995        4 |     6800
2996(5 rows)
2997
2998-- Aggregates in subquery are pushed down.
2999set enable_incremental_sort = off;
3000explain (verbose, costs off)
3001select count(x.a), sum(x.a) from (select c2 a, sum(c1) b from ft1 group by c2, sqrt(c1) order by 1, 2) x;
3002                                                                 QUERY PLAN                                                                  
3003---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3004 Aggregate
3005   Output: count(ft1.c2), sum(ft1.c2)
3006   ->  Foreign Scan
3007         Output: ft1.c2, (sum(ft1.c1)), (sqrt((ft1.c1)::double precision))
3008         Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3009         Remote SQL: SELECT c2, sum("C 1"), sqrt("C 1") FROM "S 1"."T 1" GROUP BY 1, 3 ORDER BY c2 ASC NULLS LAST, sum("C 1") ASC NULLS LAST
3010(6 rows)
3011
3012select count(x.a), sum(x.a) from (select c2 a, sum(c1) b from ft1 group by c2, sqrt(c1) order by 1, 2) x;
3013 count | sum  
3014-------+------
3015  1000 | 4500
3016(1 row)
3017
3018reset enable_incremental_sort;
3019-- Aggregate is still pushed down by taking unshippable expression out
3020explain (verbose, costs off)
3021select c2 * (random() <= 1)::int as sum1, sum(c1) * c2 as sum2 from ft1 group by c2 order by 1, 2;
3022                                            QUERY PLAN                                             
3023---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3024 Sort
3025   Output: ((c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer)), ((sum(c1) * c2)), c2
3026   Sort Key: ((ft1.c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer)), ((sum(ft1.c1) * ft1.c2))
3027   ->  Foreign Scan
3028         Output: (c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer), ((sum(c1) * c2)), c2
3029         Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3030         Remote SQL: SELECT (sum("C 1") * c2), c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" GROUP BY 2
3031(7 rows)
3032
3033select c2 * (random() <= 1)::int as sum1, sum(c1) * c2 as sum2 from ft1 group by c2 order by 1, 2;
3034 sum1 |  sum2  
3035------+--------
3036    0 |      0
3037    1 |  49600
3038    2 |  99400
3039    3 | 149400
3040    4 | 199600
3041    5 | 250000
3042    6 | 300600
3043    7 | 351400
3044    8 | 402400
3045    9 | 453600
3046(10 rows)
3047
3048-- Aggregate with unshippable GROUP BY clause are not pushed
3049explain (verbose, costs off)
3050select c2 * (random() <= 1)::int as c2 from ft2 group by c2 * (random() <= 1)::int order by 1;
3051                                  QUERY PLAN                                  
3052------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3053 Sort
3054   Output: ((c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer))
3055   Sort Key: ((ft2.c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer))
3056   ->  HashAggregate
3057         Output: ((c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer))
3058         Group Key: (ft2.c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer)
3059         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2
3060               Output: (c2 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer)
3061               Remote SQL: SELECT c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
3062(9 rows)
3063
3064-- GROUP BY clause in various forms, cardinal, alias and constant expression
3065explain (verbose, costs off)
3066select count(c2) w, c2 x, 5 y, 7.0 z from ft1 group by 2, y, 9.0::int order by 2;
3067                                                 QUERY PLAN                                                 
3068------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3069 Foreign Scan
3070   Output: (count(c2)), c2, 5, 7.0, 9
3071   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3072   Remote SQL: SELECT count(c2), c2, 5, 7.0, 9 FROM "S 1"."T 1" GROUP BY 2, 3, 5 ORDER BY c2 ASC NULLS LAST
3073(4 rows)
3074
3075select count(c2) w, c2 x, 5 y, 7.0 z from ft1 group by 2, y, 9.0::int order by 2;
3076  w  | x | y |  z  
3077-----+---+---+-----
3078 100 | 0 | 5 | 7.0
3079 100 | 1 | 5 | 7.0
3080 100 | 2 | 5 | 7.0
3081 100 | 3 | 5 | 7.0
3082 100 | 4 | 5 | 7.0
3083 100 | 5 | 5 | 7.0
3084 100 | 6 | 5 | 7.0
3085 100 | 7 | 5 | 7.0
3086 100 | 8 | 5 | 7.0
3087 100 | 9 | 5 | 7.0
3088(10 rows)
3089
3090-- GROUP BY clause referring to same column multiple times
3091-- Also, ORDER BY contains an aggregate function
3092explain (verbose, costs off)
3093select c2, c2 from ft1 where c2 > 6 group by 1, 2 order by sum(c1);
3094                                                         QUERY PLAN                                                         
3095----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3096 Foreign Scan
3097   Output: c2, c2, (sum(c1))
3098   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3099   Remote SQL: SELECT c2, c2, sum("C 1") FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c2 > 6)) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY sum("C 1") ASC NULLS LAST
3100(4 rows)
3101
3102select c2, c2 from ft1 where c2 > 6 group by 1, 2 order by sum(c1);
3103 c2 | c2 
3104----+----
3105  7 |  7
3106  8 |  8
3107  9 |  9
3108(3 rows)
3109
3110-- Testing HAVING clause shippability
3111explain (verbose, costs off)
3112select c2, sum(c1) from ft2 group by c2 having avg(c1) < 500 and sum(c1) < 49800 order by c2;
3113                                                                         QUERY PLAN                                                                         
3114------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3115 Foreign Scan
3116   Output: c2, (sum(c1))
3117   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft2)
3118   Remote SQL: SELECT c2, sum("C 1") FROM "S 1"."T 1" GROUP BY 1 HAVING ((avg("C 1") < 500::numeric)) AND ((sum("C 1") < 49800)) ORDER BY c2 ASC NULLS LAST
3119(4 rows)
3120
3121select c2, sum(c1) from ft2 group by c2 having avg(c1) < 500 and sum(c1) < 49800 order by c2;
3122 c2 |  sum  
3123----+-------
3124  1 | 49600
3125  2 | 49700
3126(2 rows)
3127
3128-- Unshippable HAVING clause will be evaluated locally, and other qual in HAVING clause is pushed down
3129explain (verbose, costs off)
3130select count(*) from (select c5, count(c1) from ft1 group by c5, sqrt(c2) having (avg(c1) / avg(c1)) * random() <= 1 and avg(c1) < 500) x;
3131                                                              QUERY PLAN                                                               
3132---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3133 Aggregate
3134   Output: count(*)
3135   ->  Foreign Scan
3136         Output: ft1.c5, NULL::bigint, (sqrt((ft1.c2)::double precision))
3137         Filter: (((((avg(ft1.c1)) / (avg(ft1.c1))))::double precision * random()) <= '1'::double precision)
3138         Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3139         Remote SQL: SELECT c5, NULL::bigint, sqrt(c2), avg("C 1") FROM "S 1"."T 1" GROUP BY 1, 3 HAVING ((avg("C 1") < 500::numeric))
3140(7 rows)
3141
3142select count(*) from (select c5, count(c1) from ft1 group by c5, sqrt(c2) having (avg(c1) / avg(c1)) * random() <= 1 and avg(c1) < 500) x;
3143 count 
3144-------
3145    49
3146(1 row)
3147
3148-- Aggregate in HAVING clause is not pushable, and thus aggregation is not pushed down
3149explain (verbose, costs off)
3150select sum(c1) from ft1 group by c2 having avg(c1 * (random() <= 1)::int) > 100 order by 1;
3151                                            QUERY PLAN                                             
3152---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3153 Sort
3154   Output: (sum(c1)), c2
3155   Sort Key: (sum(ft1.c1))
3156   ->  HashAggregate
3157         Output: sum(c1), c2
3158         Group Key: ft1.c2
3159         Filter: (avg((ft1.c1 * ((random() <= '1'::double precision))::integer)) > '100'::numeric)
3160         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
3161               Output: c1, c2
3162               Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
3163(10 rows)
3164
3165-- Remote aggregate in combination with a local Param (for the output
3166-- of an initplan) can be trouble, per bug #15781
3167explain (verbose, costs off)
3168select exists(select 1 from pg_enum), sum(c1) from ft1;
3169                    QUERY PLAN                    
3170--------------------------------------------------
3171 Foreign Scan
3172   Output: (InitPlan 1).col1, (sum(ft1.c1))
3173   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3174   Remote SQL: SELECT sum("C 1") FROM "S 1"."T 1"
3175   InitPlan 1
3176     ->  Seq Scan on pg_catalog.pg_enum
3177(6 rows)
3178
3179select exists(select 1 from pg_enum), sum(c1) from ft1;
3180 exists |  sum   
3181--------+--------
3182 t      | 500500
3183(1 row)
3184
3185explain (verbose, costs off)
3186select exists(select 1 from pg_enum), sum(c1) from ft1 group by 1;
3187                    QUERY PLAN                     
3188---------------------------------------------------
3189 GroupAggregate
3190   Output: (InitPlan 1).col1, sum(ft1.c1)
3191   InitPlan 1
3192     ->  Seq Scan on pg_catalog.pg_enum
3193   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
3194         Output: ft1.c1
3195         Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1" FROM "S 1"."T 1"
3196(7 rows)
3197
3198select exists(select 1 from pg_enum), sum(c1) from ft1 group by 1;
3199 exists |  sum   
3200--------+--------
3201 t      | 500500
3202(1 row)
3203
3204-- Testing ORDER BY, DISTINCT, FILTER, Ordered-sets and VARIADIC within aggregates
3205-- ORDER BY within aggregate, same column used to order
3206explain (verbose, costs off)
3207select array_agg(c1 order by c1) from ft1 where c1 < 100 group by c2 order by 1;
3208                                                                                            QUERY PLAN                                                                                            
3209--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3210 Foreign Scan
3211   Output: (array_agg(c1 ORDER BY c1)), c2
3212   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3213   Remote SQL: SELECT array_agg("C 1" ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST), c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" < 100)) GROUP BY 2 ORDER BY array_agg("C 1" ORDER BY "C 1" ASC NULLS LAST) ASC NULLS LAST
3214(4 rows)
3215
3216select array_agg(c1 order by c1) from ft1 where c1 < 100 group by c2 order by 1;
3217           array_agg            
3218--------------------------------
3219 {1,11,21,31,41,51,61,71,81,91}
3220 {2,12,22,32,42,52,62,72,82,92}
3221 {3,13,23,33,43,53,63,73,83,93}
3222 {4,14,24,34,44,54,64,74,84,94}
3223 {5,15,25,35,45,55,65,75,85,95}
3224 {6,16,26,36,46,56,66,76,86,96}
3225 {7,17,27,37,47,57,67,77,87,97}
3226 {8,18,28,38,48,58,68,78,88,98}
3227 {9,19,29,39,49,59,69,79,89,99}
3228 {10,20,30,40,50,60,70,80,90}
3229(10 rows)
3230
3231-- ORDER BY within aggregate, different column used to order also using DESC
3232explain (verbose, costs off)
3233select array_agg(c5 order by c1 desc) from ft2 where c2 = 6 and c1 < 50;
3234                                                       QUERY PLAN                                                        
3235-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3236 Foreign Scan
3237   Output: (array_agg(c5 ORDER BY c1 DESC))
3238   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft2)
3239   Remote SQL: SELECT array_agg(c5 ORDER BY "C 1" DESC NULLS FIRST) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" < 50)) AND ((c2 = 6))
3240(4 rows)
3241
3242select array_agg(c5 order by c1 desc) from ft2 where c2 = 6 and c1 < 50;
3243                                                                array_agg                                                                 
3244------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3245 {"Mon Feb 16 00:00:00 1970","Fri Feb 06 00:00:00 1970","Tue Jan 27 00:00:00 1970","Sat Jan 17 00:00:00 1970","Wed Jan 07 00:00:00 1970"}
3246(1 row)
3247
3248-- DISTINCT within aggregate
3249explain (verbose, costs off)
3250select array_agg(distinct (t1.c1)%5) from ft4 t1 full join ft5 t2 on (t1.c1 = t2.c1) where t1.c1 < 20 or (t1.c1 is null and t2.c1 < 5) group by (t2.c1)%3 order by 1;
3251                                                                                                                               QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                               
3252------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3253 Foreign Scan
3254   Output: (array_agg(DISTINCT (t1.c1 % 5))), ((t2.c1 % 3))
3255   Relations: Aggregate on ((public.ft4 t1) FULL JOIN (public.ft5 t2))
3256   Remote SQL: SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT (r1.c1 % 5)), (r2.c1 % 3) FROM ("S 1"."T 3" r1 FULL JOIN "S 1"."T 4" r2 ON (((r1.c1 = r2.c1)))) WHERE (((r1.c1 < 20) OR ((r1.c1 IS NULL) AND (r2.c1 < 5)))) GROUP BY 2 ORDER BY array_agg(DISTINCT (r1.c1 % 5)) ASC NULLS LAST
3257(4 rows)
3258
3259select array_agg(distinct (t1.c1)%5) from ft4 t1 full join ft5 t2 on (t1.c1 = t2.c1) where t1.c1 < 20 or (t1.c1 is null and t2.c1 < 5) group by (t2.c1)%3 order by 1;
3260  array_agg   
3261--------------
3262 {0,1,2,3,4}
3263 {1,2,3,NULL}
3264(2 rows)
3265
3266-- DISTINCT combined with ORDER BY within aggregate
3267explain (verbose, costs off)
3268select array_agg(distinct (t1.c1)%5 order by (t1.c1)%5) from ft4 t1 full join ft5 t2 on (t1.c1 = t2.c1) where t1.c1 < 20 or (t1.c1 is null and t2.c1 < 5) group by (t2.c1)%3 order by 1;
3269                                                                                                                                                                     QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                     
3270----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3271 Foreign Scan
3272   Output: (array_agg(DISTINCT (t1.c1 % 5) ORDER BY (t1.c1 % 5))), ((t2.c1 % 3))
3273   Relations: Aggregate on ((public.ft4 t1) FULL JOIN (public.ft5 t2))
3274   Remote SQL: SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT (r1.c1 % 5) ORDER BY ((r1.c1 % 5)) ASC NULLS LAST), (r2.c1 % 3) FROM ("S 1"."T 3" r1 FULL JOIN "S 1"."T 4" r2 ON (((r1.c1 = r2.c1)))) WHERE (((r1.c1 < 20) OR ((r1.c1 IS NULL) AND (r2.c1 < 5)))) GROUP BY 2 ORDER BY array_agg(DISTINCT (r1.c1 % 5) ORDER BY ((r1.c1 % 5)) ASC NULLS LAST) ASC NULLS LAST
3275(4 rows)
3276
3277select array_agg(distinct (t1.c1)%5 order by (t1.c1)%5) from ft4 t1 full join ft5 t2 on (t1.c1 = t2.c1) where t1.c1 < 20 or (t1.c1 is null and t2.c1 < 5) group by (t2.c1)%3 order by 1;

3279--------------

3283
3284explain (verbose, costs off)
3285select array_agg(distinct (t1.c1)%5 order by (t1.c1)%5 desc nulls last) from ft4 t1 full join ft5 t2 on (t1.c1 = t2.c1) where t1.c1 < 20 or (t1.c1 is null and t2.c1 < 5) group by (t2.c1)%3 order by 1;
3286                                                                                                                                                                      QUERY PLAN                                                                                                                                                                      
3287------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

3292(4 rows)
3293
3294select array_agg(distinct (t1.c1)%5 order by (t1.c1)%5 desc nulls last) from ft4 t1 full join ft5 t2 on (t1.c1 = t2.c1) where t1.c1 < 20 or (t1.c1 is null and t2.c1 < 5) group by (t2.c1)%3 order by 1;

3301-- FILTER within aggregate
3302explain (verbose, costs off)
3303select sum(c1) filter (where c1 < 100 and c2 > 5) from ft1 group by c2 order by 1 nulls last;
3304                                                                                         QUERY PLAN                                                                                         
3305--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3306 Foreign Scan
3307   Output: (sum(c1) FILTER (WHERE ((c1 < 100) AND (c2 > 5)))), c2
3308   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3309   Remote SQL: SELECT sum("C 1") FILTER (WHERE (("C 1" < 100) AND (c2 > 5))), c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" GROUP BY 2 ORDER BY sum("C 1") FILTER (WHERE (("C 1" < 100) AND (c2 > 5))) ASC NULLS LAST

3327-- DISTINCT, ORDER BY and FILTER within aggregate
3328explain (verbose, costs off)
3329select sum(c1%3), sum(distinct c1%3 order by c1%3) filter (where c1%3 < 2), c2 from ft1 where c2 = 6 group by c2;
3330                                                                                        QUERY PLAN                                                                                        
3331------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3332 Foreign Scan
3333   Output: (sum((c1 % 3))), (sum(DISTINCT (c1 % 3) ORDER BY (c1 % 3)) FILTER (WHERE ((c1 % 3) < 2))), c2
3334   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)
3335   Remote SQL: SELECT sum(("C 1" % 3)), sum(DISTINCT ("C 1" % 3) ORDER BY (("C 1" % 3)) ASC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE (("C 1" % 3) < 2)), c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c2 = 6)) GROUP BY 3
3336(4 rows)
3337
3338select sum(c1%3), sum(distinct c1%3 order by c1%3) filter (where c1%3 < 2), c2 from ft1 where c2 = 6 group by c2;

3340-----+-----+----
3341  99 |   1 |  6
3342(1 row)
3343
3344-- Outer query is aggregation query
3345explain (verbose, costs off)
3346select distinct (select count(*) filter (where t2.c2 = 6 and t2.c1 < 10) from ft1 t1 where t1.c1 = 6) from ft2 t2 where t2.c2 % 6 = 0 order by 1;
3347                                                          QUERY PLAN                                                          
3348------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3349 Unique
3350   Output: ((SubPlan 1))
3351   ->  Sort
3352         Output: ((SubPlan 1))
3353         Sort Key: ((SubPlan 1))
3354         ->  Foreign Scan
3355               Output: (SubPlan 1)
3356               Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft2 t2)
3357               Remote SQL: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE ((c2 = 6) AND ("C 1" < 10))) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (((c2 % 6) = 0))
3358               SubPlan 1
3359                 ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 t1
3360                       Output: (count(*) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.c2 = 6) AND (t2.c1 < 10))))
3361                       Remote SQL: SELECT NULL FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 6))
3362(13 rows)
3363
3364select distinct (select count(*) filter (where t2.c2 = 6 and t2.c1 < 10) from ft1 t1 where t1.c1 = 6) from ft2 t2 where t2.c2 % 6 = 0 order by 1;

3366-------
3367     1
3368(1 row)
3369
3370-- Inner query is aggregation query
3371explain (verbose, costs off)
3372select distinct (select count(t1.c1) filter (where t2.c2 = 6 and t2.c1 < 10) from ft1 t1 where t1.c1 = 6) from ft2 t2 where t2.c2 % 6 = 0 order by 1;
3373                                                                      QUERY PLAN                                                                      
3374------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3375 Unique
3376   Output: ((SubPlan 1))
3377   ->  Sort
3378         Output: ((SubPlan 1))
3379         Sort Key: ((SubPlan 1))
3380         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft2 t2
3381               Output: (SubPlan 1)
3382               Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (((c2 % 6) = 0))
3383               SubPlan 1
3384                 ->  Foreign Scan
3385                       Output: (count(t1.c1) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.c2 = 6) AND (t2.c1 < 10))))
3386                       Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1 t1)
3387                       Remote SQL: SELECT count("C 1") FILTER (WHERE (($1::integer = 6) AND ($2::integer < 10))) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE (("C 1" = 6))
3388(13 rows)
3389

3397-- Aggregate not pushed down as FILTER condition is not pushable
3398explain (verbose, costs off)
3399select sum(c1) filter (where (c1 / c1) * random() <= 1) from ft1 group by c2 order by 1;
3400                                                       QUERY PLAN                                                       
3401------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3402 Sort
3403   Output: (sum(c1) FILTER (WHERE ((((c1 / c1))::double precision * random()) <= '1'::double precision))), c2
3404   Sort Key: (sum(ft1.c1) FILTER (WHERE ((((ft1.c1 / ft1.c1))::double precision * random()) <= '1'::double precision)))
3405   ->  HashAggregate
3406         Output: sum(c1) FILTER (WHERE ((((c1 / c1))::double precision * random()) <= '1'::double precision)), c2
3407         Group Key: ft1.c2
3408         ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
3409               Output: c1, c2
3410               Remote SQL: SELECT "C 1", c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1"
3411(9 rows)
3412
3413explain (verbose, costs off)
3414select sum(c2) filter (where c2 in (select c2 from ft1 where c2 < 5)) from ft1;

3416-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

3418   Output: sum(ft1.c2) FILTER (WHERE (ANY (ft1.c2 = (hashed SubPlan 1).col1)))
3419   ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1
3420         Output: ft1.c2

3422   SubPlan 1
3423     ->  Foreign Scan on public.ft1 ft1_1
3424           Output: ft1_1.c2
3425           Remote SQL: SELECT c2 FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c2 < 5))
3426(9 rows)

3428-- Ordered-sets within aggregate
3429explain (verbose, costs off)
3430select c2, rank('10'::varchar) within group (order by c6), percentile_cont(c2/10::numeric) within group (order by c1) from ft1 where c2 < 10 group by c2 having percentile_cont(c2/10::numeric) within group (order by c1) < 500 order by c2;

3432----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

3434   Output: c2, (rank('10'::character varying) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c6)), (percentile_cont((((c2)::numeric / '10'::numeric))::double precision) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((c1)::double precision)))

3436   ->  Foreign Scan
3437         Output: c2, (rank('10'::character varying) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c6)), (percentile_cont((((c2)::numeric / '10'::numeric))::double precision) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((c1)::double precision)))

3439         Remote SQL: SELECT c2, rank('10'::character varying) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c6 ASC NULLS LAST), percentile_cont((c2 / 10::numeric)) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ("C 1") ASC NULLS LAST) FROM "S 1"."T 1" WHERE ((c2 < 10)) GROUP BY 1 HAVING ((percentile_cont((c2 / 10::numeric)) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ("C 1") ASC NULLS LAST) < 500::double precision))
3440(7 rows)

3452-- Using multiple arguments within aggregates
3453explain (verbose, costs off)
3454select c1, rank(c1, c2) within group (order by c1, c2) from ft1 group by c1, c2 having c1 = 6 order by 1;
3455                                                                             QUERY PLAN                                                                             
3456--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

3459   Relations: Aggregate on (public.ft1)

3461(4 rows)
